description:
OVERVIEW:

My life was pretty ordinary. I worked at a local farm supply store, and I didn’t expect a whole lot from the world. Then, one fateful night, on my drive home, everything changed.

I was sucked through a freaky glowing portal and dumped out in a strange world, but the wildest part was that my arrival resulted in the death of the king, and in this world, that makes me their new king.

Everything that belonged to the last king is now mine, including his kingdom, a harem of beautiful women, and the problem of neighboring barbarians burning down my villages.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Accidental King
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

When I left Michigan eight years into the apocalypse, my only three goals were: to avoid the silver aliens that had destroyed the world, to not get eaten by any undead zombies, and to find my sister.

So far, I’ve succeeded in my first two goals, and I’m so close to completing the third one.

However, there are things I never expected from my apoco-road trip.

Like finding two beautiful women who are relying on me for survival. Or being hunted by the remnants of the old world order. Or discovering that maybe, just maybe, there’s a way to defeat our extraterrestrial visitors.

But if I’m going to figure out how to save the world, I’m going to have to stay alive, which is easier said than done.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Adam and His Eves 2: Creating an Apocalypse Harem
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

I have finally reunited with my sister, and together we saved her doctor friend from the NSS bastards. The old me would be satisfied with that. But the new me has questions that need answering and a group of people looking to me for what to do next.

For the last eight years, all I’ve cared about was survival. If I could avoid the undead and the aliens in their silver ships, it was a good day.

But maybe surviving isn’t enough anymore. Maybe it’s time we start planning to fight back. Against the undead, the Silvers, and any idiot who decides to get in our way.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Adam and His Eves 3: Creating an Apocalypse Harem
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

We’ve managed to survive hordes of the undead, crazy cults, wannabe government assholes, and our silver extraterrestrial visitors.

But I want more than just survival now.

I have a group of people looking to me to protect and lead them, and I refuse to let them down.

But if we’re going to start really leaving, we need more supplies and, most importantly, a base.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Adam and His Eves 4: Creating an Apocalypse Harem
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

My new found family and I have a place to call home now. It’s well fortified and defended, and we’ve already started making plans to turn our base into a self-sufficient compound with gardens and everything.

But I know we’re not completely safe yet.

The people we killed to take this base have friends, both on the ground and in the skies. So, if I’m going to protect my family, I’m going to have to be proactive.

And take the fight to them.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Adam and His Eves 5: Creating an Apocalypse Harem
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

My team and I successfully infiltrated an NSS base and stole medicine and important documents from right under their noses.

But I know this victory will be short-lived.

The NSS aren’t going to let our heist slide, and I know they will retaliate sooner rather than later. Unless we do something drastic, like simultaneously taking out a number of their bases before they can go on the offensive.

This mission will be difficult, with a lot of moving parts, not to mention the constant threat of the undead and our alien invaders.

But if we can take out the NSS, humanity might have a chance at making a comeback.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Adam and His Eves 6: Creating an Apocalypse Harem
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The human resistance, with help from me and my team, has finally taken down the NSS, the oppressive faux-government regime that ruled over the apocalyptic United States for the past eight years.

We’ve taken a massive step forward in retaking our country, but our world is still in severe danger.

Not only are the millions of undead still a problem, but the Second Wave of our alien invaders has arrived.

Fighting a war on two fronts is a good way to lose, so before the aliens can ramp up their attacks, maybe we can do something to take out our undead adversaries…

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Adam and His Eves 7: Creating an Apocalypse Harem
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The Second Wave has arrived, and it’s officially humanity’s eleventh hour.

But all hope is not lost.

We’ve managed to effectively neutralize the threat of the freaks, and I’ve also discovered that not all aliens wish for our deaths.

There’s an alien woman named Liura that I know for a fact is being forced to fight against us. If we could free her, and others like her who have the Essence, maybe we could turn the Silvers’ weapons against themselves.

And maybe, just maybe, we could retake our planet.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Adam and His Eves 8: Creating an Apocalypse Harem
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Eight years ago, we had our first extraterrestrial visitors. But they did not come in peace.
Instead, they released a virus that transformed most of Earth’s population into undead monsters, and few who survived the initial onslaught were prepared for the chaos that followed.
Somehow I survived the end of the world, and since then, I’ve just been trying to make it to each sunrise.
But then my sister went missing. Last I heard, she was in a compound several states away.
Most would see the journey as a suicide mission, but she’s the last family I have, and I’m going to find her.
My mission was supposed to be simple- well as simple as life in the end times can be, but when I run across two women that need my help, survival starts to get even more complicated.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Adam and His Eves: Creating an Apocalypse Harem
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

My name is Alex, and I am just a normal office worker from Denver.
But I’m also “the Dreamer.” Or at least that’s what the beautiful cat-girl said after I woke up in All-the-Land and saved her from a monster in a crazy forest full of smiling flowers and trees.

The Dreamer is the prophesied savior of this land. He is immune to all side effects of the world’s magical potions, and his… seed also has enhanced abilities that can be passed on to the women he so chooses.

So it’s down the rabbit hole for me, and no card queen or dark king is going to stop me from saving this world.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Alex in Haremland
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

It’s been one crazy thing after another since I woke up in a field of flowers with faces, but I’ve quickly learned a few things.

1) All-the-land is being terrorized by the Dark King and his minion Queen Cards.

2) I am the prophesized Dreamer who is immune to any adverse potion effects.

3) It’s my duty to save this realm and beat back the darkness.

The Dreamer has awakened, and minions of darkness better despair.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Alex in Haremland 2
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

They said it was just a meteor storm.

Then the storm turned into a cataclysmic event as giant rocks crashed into the Earth.

And dragons came crawling out of every one of them.

Lots and lots of radioactive dragons.

Now, nowhere but the ocean is safe, and home is an eight thousand mile journey across the seas. Even if I have to go full pirate, save some damsels in distress, and plunder to survive, I’m making it home in one piece.

Yo-ho-ho, you scaly bastards.

Disclaimer: The protagonist of this series has descriptive adult relations with multiple women, sometimes at the same time.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon

author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

The meteor storm has finally ended, but the apocalypse has just begun.

Radioactive dragons are prowling the Earth, and they’re getting better and better at hunting us all down no matter where we go.

Now more than ever, pirates like me and my women need to keep on our toes.

But with the military cracking down on the chaos out at sea, even the waters have become more dangerous.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon

author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

We’re almost out of the Atlantic Ocean and headed straight for the Caribbean Sea, but the destruction we find among the Florida Keys is a grim reminder of how dangerous the waters ahead are.

Especially as dragon eggs start appearing in the wreckage.

But even in a dragon apocalypse, there’s always a greater threat that humanity itself can throw our way.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon

author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

We’ve hopefully left drug cartels and homemade bombs behind us, but our suspicions about the US military are only increasing.

As is our fame.

The Good Pirates are definitely making their mark out here on the waters and back home, which proves useful as we start to run low on supplies.

But nothing can spare us from the dangers that come with helping the newest addition to our crew navigate a dragon-infested city in South America.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Apocalyptic Pirates 4
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

We’ve seen a terrifying number of dragons so far on our journey, but the Panama Canal is crawling with more of the scaly beasts than we ever imagined.
And as we slowly make our way through perilous waters, we’re forced to experience the effects something like this can have on the already deadly predators of the area.
It seems like things can always get worse in a dragon apocalypse, though.
Along with dragons, crocs, and all manner of hungry hunters, we may just be heading straight into the hands of some pretty dangerous humans as well.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Apocalyptic Pirates 5
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

With the deadly Panama Canal finally behind us, we’re hopefully heading into safer waters.

Unfortunately, that means it’s time for The Good Pirates to reveal the truth about what the USCG is really up to in Central America. Then we can only hope for the best.

Luckily, our getaway path gives us the chance to provide more crucial assistance than we’ve ever done before, all while exploring the strange healing properties of the dragons.

But danger and corruption can come from all sides during a dragon apocalypse.

Even from unexpected organizations.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Apocalyptic Pirates 6
author: Eric Vall

OVERVIEW:

So much for safer waters. The crossing to Hawaii will have to wait a bit longer.

The scientist, Marley’s gone and endangered herself, and now we need to find her before she gets herself killed.

The Good Pirates are on a rescue mission, and maybe, if we can keep ourselves from being turned into dragon dinner, we can save a few others, too.

But none of us are prepared for the deep dark secret coming our way.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Apocalyptic Pirates 7
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

We’re on our way to Hawaii. After months of preparing for the crossing, we’re finally ready.

We’ve faced monstrous dragons, gangsters, and the might of Asclepius and the U.S. Government to come this far, but we’re not in the clear yet.

We’ve run into a harsh storm, and we think we've got to turn back until a cruise ship arrives and presents the beautiful allure of stability in the storm.

But there’s a secret in it’s depths we weren’t prepared for.

description:
OVERVIEW:

Thank you, thank you, thank you all for coming. What a great looking group of people we have here today. As your President, I feel it’s important to tell you all about this guy. He’s a great guy. A real stand up guy. A real go-getter. His name is Marc Havak, and let me tell you, this guy is going to be huge.

See, when the aliens came down and told us they’d enslave all of the human race if we didn’t send our bigliest warrior to participate in their arena death games, I laughed at them. It was really funny because they obviously didn’t know who they were dealing with. Know what I mean? Then they said they would pick the greatest warrior, and they picked Marc Havak. He seemed like such an average guy, but he was a true blue American. He even worked as a truck driver! That’s the kind of good guy we want defending us from aliens.

I took one look at Marc and realized that he was just the right guy to save our planet. I always make the best decisions, and this one was one of the best decisions. Turns out Marc was really good at kicking alien ass. He won all the games, got all the prizes, and slept with all the hot alien women. And let me tell you, these women are some real beauties, and they don’t mind sharing Marc. He is just that great. Of course, he’s still not quite as accomplished as I am, but no one is.

There is more to it than that. You should check his story out. It’s a great story. A fantastic story. One of the best, and I know good stories. You’ll love it.

My women and I have officially left our mark on the legendary oasis of Bayalon, and now that we’re swimming in hard-earned jewels, we’re certainly moving up in my homeworld as well.
So it’s time to rise to even greater heights beyond the foggy portal.
Which means it’s time to enter arenas with the highest stakes possible.
But I’ve trained my deadly lovers for this very moment. They’re more than prepared to bring us glory and riches in the bloodiest ways possible.
And I’m more than prepared to gather even more gorgeous and vicious warriors to my legion along the way.

It’s time to venture further than we’ve ever dared into the savage desert lands, but finding out whether the Crown of The World truly exists is well worth the risk.

Unfortunately, this lavish oasis is far more barbaric than it appears on the surface.

I’ve seen evil before, but nothing could have prepared my four warriors and I for what the deranged backers of Zeratra are trying to pull with their fighters.

In a dangerous land with so much evil bubbling at the surface, it’s proving useful to be a king.
And it appears my reign has only begun to gain traction.
Royals and elders alike keep thrusting more riches, power, and even warrior women at me, and I’ve begun to see what the future could hold for me and my fiercely loyal women.
But necromancy and world-conquering schemes seem to go hand in hand in more oases than I expected.
And I can’t help but wonder… What if one truck driver could truly change the fate of a savage world?

I’ve never been one to shrink from a challenge— whether it’s taking a long haul across state lines in my 1982 Marmon, or ripping my crappy boss’ business right out from under him.

So a full-on war in a brutal, bloody, magic-filled desert world sure isn’t going to deter me.

Even if I have to unleash my gorgeous warrior women on every single oasis we find, we will root out the evil that’s plagued this world for too long.

It’s time for the justice of King John to be delivered.

For honor. For glory. And for the fate of the most vicious warrior women any world has ever seen.

description:
OVERVIEW:

I became a trucker to bring some travel and adventure into my days, but I never expected my classic rig would change my life so entirely.

Then old Spitfire drove us through a mysterious portal to a cutthroat and perilous world. Here, women warriors are owned by backers and pitted against one another in high-stakes arenas, and they’re not just fighting for glory.

They’re fighting for lots and lots of riches.

The only way to get my hands on my fair share is to duel a backer, kill him, and gain all his women warriors and possessions.

But that’s just the beginning.

These fierce women need a caring man who can turn them into legends and give them the best weapons money can buy.

So it’s time to train my fighters back on Earth, equip them with the best weapons I can buy, unleash them in the arenas, and get rich doing it.

And if they all want to become my lovers during the process, I’ll gladly accept.

When I got the call that my estranged grandfather had passed away and left me his trailer and a plot of land, I was just excited to own a little property and save some money by not having to pay rent.

Then I found a strange cave in my backyard. It wasn’t a sinkhole, or a bunker, or a mineshaft…

It was a dungeon. Full of crazy caverns, unbelievable monsters, and sexy, fantastical women in distress.

Oh, and loot. Lots and lots of loot that was just ripe for the taking.

So, what am I going to do with it all?

And how do I keep everyone else from finding out about it?

There hasn’t been a single dull day since the moment I found the underground world in my backyard.

If I’m not fighting monsters and finding loot, I’m out-witting gangsters, dealing with my asshole neighbor, or trying to expand my business.

Now, back in my world, it seems someone is trying to rip me off and stall my business, and down in the Twilight, a Goblin king is colluding with the Demon Lord.

And it’s up to me to find the solutions to both these problems.

OVERVIEW:

A year ago, I was just a college grad trying to make enough money to live. Then I inherited a trailer, a small plot of land, and a whole underground world hidden in my backyard.

Now, I’m a hero of the Gloom, with more titles than I know what to do with, and on the surface world, I own half the cul-de-sac and am in the process of starting a business.

And I’m about to become a father.

Almost everything is perfect, but minions of the Deeper Dark keep crawling up through the cracks and into the Gloom, and it’s my job to hold back the tide.

No pressure.

Things have been relatively calm in the Gloom recently, but my life on the surface has gotten a little crazy.

I’ve managed to finally buy up my entire cul-de-sac and am drafting up plans to turn it into our own little compound for my wives and future children. Ibseth has also given birth to our first son, who I love more than life itself, and Nate and I are ramping up plans to build our shooting range and possibly another surplus store.

My hands are more than full already, but then my lawyer, Travis Meyer, tells me he’s run into a problem with an old nemesis trying to blackmail him.

And no one messes with my people.

My lawyer is no longer being blackmailed, and plans for the shooting range and my cul-de-sac compound are coming along great.

Of course, that means things in the Gloom have taken a turn for the worse.

Cave quakes have been popping up all over the underground world, and it’s only a matter of time before my friends and allies suffer the effects of such natural disasters.

Except, I don’t think these quakes are natural.

description:
OVERVIEW:

While I’ve been collecting enchanted armor pieces to take on the Demon Lord of Chaos, it seems our enemies have been anything but idle.

A horde of Demons has attacked the Goblin city of Glecik, and as their King Consort, I’m not about to take that lightly.

However, our best course of action remains tied to the Armor of Vallis, so while I wait for my next vision, I’ll make sure my people are taken care of.

Both above and below the surface.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon 18
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

I now only need one more piece to complete the Armor of Vallis, but the greaves will have to wait until I can get a few things off my plate.

First, I need to figure out why Sullak, the Demon Lord of Sorrows, has sought me out and what he wants.

I also have a new store to open with Nate, and it seems Chief Murdrak is coming to the end of his long life soon, too.

But once I deal with those things, it looks like a trip to the Deeper Dark is in my near future.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon 19
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

My life has only gotten crazier since I found the hole in my backyard that led to a magical underground world.

But I wouldn’t change it for anything.

I own my own land, my wife, Ibseth, is a beautiful Night Elf who adores me, and my gorgeous half-demon partner Amrila is the perfect companion to have at my side while I loot the underground dungeon world known as the Gloom.

But Ibseth’s insane half-brother is still hunting for her, and I need a way to take care of him for good.

And for that, I’ll need allies.

And new guns.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon 2
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

My mission into the Deeper Dark was initially two-fold: I was to do recon of the Demon Lords’ forces and bring that information back to the Gloom, and I was meant to find a reliquary for Sullak, the Lord of Sorrows, so I could free my friend Scourge of the Demon Lord’s pact.

But things don’t always go as planned.

Now, I find myself in the middle of a rebellion. But, if I can get the peoples of the Deeper Dark to revolt against their lords, my original two goals might be accomplished more easily.

I just have to survive a Demon siege first.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon 20
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

My party and I survived our recon-mission-turned-rebellion into the Deeper Dark and even managed to kill one of the Demon Lords.

But things are only ramping up in the subterranean caverns.

Now, I must prepare the Gloom and the Twilight for the impending war with Belzat, which might appear on our doorstep sooner than expected.

I also have my ever-growing family to think about, and since it’s an all-hands-on-deck situation, maybe it’s time to let a long-time friend in on my underground secret.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon 21
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Things have only been looking up for me since I found the hole in my backyard that led to a secret, underground world.

Now, I have my own property, a lot of loot that I’ve converted into cash, and two beautiful women to come home to every day.

But one of my neighbors seems to have a problem with me, and there’s still the issue of my wife Ibseth’s crazy half-brother that keeps getting crazier.

Seems I have my work cut out for me both on my cul-de-sac and in the deep dungeon in my backyard.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon 3
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

My life has certainly taken a turn for the better ever since I found the hidden underground dungeon in my backyard.

But living two lives is certainly not easy.

Not only do I have to contend with nosy neighbors and a sketchy Irishman who fences my loot, but there’s still the problem of my wife’s crazy half-brother hanging over my head.

I know the bastard chief is in league with Demons, but I won’t be able to take him out on my own.

So, I’ll need to make allies of the remaining Night Elf tribes and prepare for the worst.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon 4
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

My to-do list is ever growing, but I couldn’t be happier.

I’ve started buying up the cul-de-sac to give my wives their own houses, and Ibseth is happy to be nesting, now that she’s pregnant with our first child.

But I still need to take out her half-brother, Ursenger.

And to do that, I will need help from the rest of the Gloom.

It’s time to go to war.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon 5
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Ursenger has finally been defeated, and my first wife Ibseth can rest a little easier knowing her crazy half-brother can’t hurt her anymore.
But all is still not right with the Gloom, and even worse, things aren't right on the surface, either.
Someone has been following me, and I need to make sure my homes and family are safe before I can address what is happening in the Twilight and Deeper Dark.
But as the song says, I've got friends in low places, and my buddy Scourge has been looking for an excuse to come visit the surface...

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon 6
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Now that I’ve taken care of the wannabe mobster that was breathing down my neck, I can once again focus on the important things.

Like buying up more of the cul-de-sac, spoiling my wives, and preparing to become a father.

Oh, and there’s also the problem of more monsters crawling out of the Twilight and Deeper Dark.

But I’ll do whatever it takes to protect my family, my friends, and the Gloom.

Even if I have to hunt down a coven of crazed Vampires.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon 7
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Halloween is just around the corner, and I can’t wait to celebrate with my wives.

But unfortunately, someone or something named Mikeil is sending out creepy chimera minions to try and kill me.

So in between getting married, starting up a new business, and telling my best friend the truth about my new riches and wives, I’ll have to hunt down this Mikeil and make sure he can’t threaten me or my family ever again.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon 8
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

I’ve taken out another one of Belzat’s minions, but there are still others hiding in the shadows of the Gloom and Twlight.

And now there are rumors of a Succubus attacking innocents.

So it’s up to my allies, wives, and me to fight back against the darkness and keep each other safe.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon 9
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

I thought the craziest change I would experience in my life was moving to London to run a pub that my late uncle left me, but then I found what was under the pub.

A whole fantastical world was hidden beneath my feet. Full of monsters, magic, and beautiful women who need my help.

After I saved a gorgeous Elven princess, she told me she had been framed for her father’s murder and has been on the run ever since.

So, between settling into the UK and figuring out how to run a pub, now I have to find a way to help the princess win back her kingdom. The risks were deadly, but the reward could include love and endless wealth.

I was going to risk it. Wouldn’t you?


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon: UK Edition
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The fate of the Shadowlayer hangs in the balance, and the eve of the final battle draws nearer every day.

So, if I’m finally going to defeat Helshivir and banish him back to the hole he crawled out of, I’ll need to up the ante.

And what better way to do that than to awaken my Unseelie magic?

That’s only the first step in my master plan, though. I’m also aiming to whittle down our enemy’s numbers before the grand finale, and thanks to some presents from a friend back in America, thinning the herd should be a walk in the park.

All the pieces are finally coming together, and I can’t wait to bring the Shadowlayer a little light.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon: UK Edition 10
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

It’s been a few weeks since I moved to London, and things have been incredible so far.

But that might have something to do with the secret world under my pub and my new, beautiful Elven girlfriend.

My life is a little hectic juggling the responsibilities of being a business owner and a hero, but I’m not complaining.

Not even when creature attacks start plaguing the Shadowlayer.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon: UK Edition 2
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

My new life in old London town is going quite well.

Business is starting to pick up at the pub, and my barmaid and I have finally acted on the simmering tension between us, so now I have two beautiful women to warm my bed at night.

But a shadow has fallen over the underground world. A mysterious entity is lurking in the dark, pulling the strings. My Elven princess and I are still on the hunt for the amulet pieces that could aid us in the war against this entity, but then we received notice that things aren’t looking good in the Orc Realm…


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon: UK Edition 3
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

My Elven girlfriend and I have repaid our Orc allies by saving their realm, but I know the dark entity pulling the strings from the shadows isn’t done wreaking havoc on the Shadowlayer.

I’m on a quest to find some answers, both about our unseen foe and about my Uncle’s prior involvement with the underground world. Various clues have led us to Oxfordshire, and while some parts of the mystery are solved, I’m left with even more answers.

And of course, that’s when we received word that the Fae Realm is under attack…


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon: UK Edition 4
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

I have once again beaten back the darkness threatening to consume the Shadowlayer, but I know it’s only a matter of time before it returns.

And before that happens, I need some answers. Namely from the ancient sorcerer who has apparently been living/hiding in my uncle’s old lodge.

But, as with all Shadowlayer-related things, the answers I seek only bring up more questions, and those questions lead me on another quest.

To the Ancient Forest of the Goblins, who may or may not be very welcoming when they hear the request I make of them.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon: UK Edition 5
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The war against the dark entity plaguing the Shadowlayer continues, but I have an ace up my sleeve that my enemies won’t see coming.

And that ace is an incredibly old sorcerer who won’t be so incredibly old for much longer. Not if I have something to say about it.

However, first I must convince the Ancient Goblins to help, and apparently they aren’t big fans of the sorcerer Djarneth.

And if that’s not enough of a problem, Queen Eleris says she’s discovered the whereabouts of her missing family members, but the circumstances surrounding the AWOL royal family are… suspicious at best.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon: UK Edition 6
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The dark entity known as Helshivir continues to be a major pain in the ass, but every time he pops up, my allies and I work hard to smack him back down a peg or two.

Queen Eleris’ possessed undead family are currently in the wind, but we have other things to focus on until they’re hunted down.

Like the fact that more monsters are infiltrating the tunnel system.

And the taxidermist that runs the shop down the road who looks suspiciously Orcish.

Plus, things are smelling kinda fishy in the Mer Realm…


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon: UK Edition 7
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Tensions are definitely high in the Shadowlayer.

The Mer Realm has been infiltrated by the darkness, even if their leader seemingly refuses to acknowledge this fact. The Orcs are also up in arms about the missing bodies of their fallen brethren and are looking to blame anyone and everyone for this slight.

As Prince Consort of the Marigold Realm, it’s up to me to smooth over diplomatic relations, and with the help of my new Mermaid ally, Iryth, maybe we can save all our kingdoms with minimal bloodshed.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon: UK Edition 8
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

My allies and I have beaten Helshivir back for the moment, but he’s firmly entrenched beneath the Mer palace. If we are going to free the realm, and all of the Shadowlayer, from his darkness, then we’ll need to get our ducks in a row.

And fast.

First, we need to keep him weak while we figure out how to fix his magical prison. I have it on good authority that his cage was made by the Unseelie Fae, and they are the only ones who can fix it.

So, if I can get the Unseelie Court on our side, we can make sure Helshivir’s cell is good and ready for when my girlfriend Myria perfects the banishment spell.

The final battle for the Shadowlayer is fast approaching, and while I’m doing the best I can to prepare, it would be nice to have an ace up my sleeve.

Maybe it’s finally time I give Mr. Eddie Hill a call…

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon: UK Edition 9
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Milton was your average delivery driver until he had a run in with a dying fairy who imbued him with all his magical power. Now Milton can literally tear the blood out of his enemies with a gesture of his hand, every women he meets is attracted to his magical charm, and the powerful Fae Guild wants to pay him a bunch of money to fight evil.

All these new powers are a good thing, since a mad scientist has unleashed a monstrous horde of, well, monsters into the world, and Milton, along with his two new girlfriends, are the the only people who can stop him.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Blood Mage
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Milton may have once been a mild-mannered delivery driver, but now, he is one of the top agents in a magical Fae Guild with blood magic at his very fingertips and a team of gorgeous, badass faerie women around him. Everything is looking perfect, until a new crime wave starts in Jefferson City.

Some evil bastards have started to kidnap innocent baby magical creatures. That's bad, but these creatures could be powerful enough to take down the city and the Seelie Court, so that’s even worse.

Fortunately, Milton’s power is growing, and nothing will stop him from saving the world.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Blood Mage 2
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The die have been cast, and now the fate of both the Fae and the human race rest in Milton’s hands.

Milton is the Racmoth, a hero destined in Fae lore to defeat the forces of evil. It’s a lot for him to wrap his head around, but thankfully he has his band of beautiful, badass women to help him along the way.

Together, Milton and his team must use their powers to battle an ancient wizard, an undead army, and scores of monsters from the nether realm.

And to think, a month ago he had just been a delivery driver.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Blood Mage 3
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

When the Chief Constable is found dead, everyone looks to DCI Logan Thorne to solve the case. But once he finds a taunting message from the killer with the threat to strike again, there is only one conclusion: a serial cop killer is on the loose.
Will Thorne find him before he strikes again?
Or is Thorne the next victim?
title: Blue Vengeance: A Logan Thorne DCI Scottish Detective Thriller
author: Duncan Wallace

description:
OVERVIEW:

Kill the traitor-prince.
The cry for Wes Malcolm's death has followed him from Earth all the way to Avalon, and an entire new breed of Hordebeast has taken up the call. Howling wolf-men now hunt him as an escaped convict, a false teacher, and a traitor to a legacy he had rejected immediately. Worse yet, he must fight not only for his own freedom, but for the prisoners he rescued from the dungeon on this ruined world.

Now he needs to evade the monsters long enough to get the former hostages to safety, then grow strong enough to battle his hunters and win. To do so, he’s going to have to delve into the ruins of this world and discover ghosts and secrets from another age, including the hidden history of Earth itself.

He cannot fall here. Too many worlds have put their hope in him.

Sequel to Downfall and Rise.
Epic Portal Fantasy with LITRPG/GameLit elements. Features profanity and adult themes. Also features a multi-bodied alien nerd-girl with a penchant for wearing ironic Earth t-shirts as a love interest. You have been warned.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Brace For the Wolves
author: Nathan Thompson

description:
OVERVIEW:

When Tyler King, a beer aficionado, finds himself transported to the magical land of Hagop, he discovers a world filled with cunning dwarves, enigmatic gnomes, brutish ogres, and beautiful women. It seems like the perfect place, until he discovers the real horror: nobody in this magical world knows how to brew a decent beer.

But Tyler knows how to make great beer.

He is going to create an empire of barley, but doing so means a life of adventure, danger, and bitter rivalries. Success will be an epic challenge, but the rewards will be fame, fortune, and the love of the beautiful women of Hagop and-- once they taste his beer-- of the whole realm, too.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Brew Master
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Tyler King’s first beer, King’s Brew, was a huge success, but not everybody in the idyllic fantasy village of Hagop is happy about it. The King of Rothbart is none-too-pleased to find out that a lowly human brewer has “stolen” the use of the royal title for his beer, and, to avoid terrible trouble, Tyler is going to have to make a brand new beer for the king and his royal court, the likes of which nobody there has ever tasted.

Meanwhile, Tyler urgently needs to expand his operation out of the Inn and into a true brewing facility where he can ensure every batch is identical. But it’s easier said than done, since no self-respecting dwarf will sell Tyler his brewery, and no elf vintner will want a human moving into the neighborhood and lowering property values.

Tyler and his beautiful lovers, along with his clever sidekick Babble the Gnome, will have to outsmart and outmaneuver everyone to get a proper brewery if he’s going to meet the king’s challenge and brew the perfect beer.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Brew Master 2
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Tyler King has it all: the love of two beautiful women, a loyal gnomish best friend, royal charter, and an amazing country estate to brew his beer.

Well, almost all. He wants to improve his production methods and take his brewing process from medieval to modern consistency, and to do that he will need the assistance of a master metalsmith who can make the finest brewing facilities in the land.

Unfortunately, it won’t be so easy. The rare (and possible magical) metal they need is only mined high up in the mountains where men rarely travel, and Tyler will have to broker a deal with the strange mountain folk to get what he needs. If that treacherous journey wasn’t enough, the delightful Princess Juliette has her plans to embroil Tyler in, and he cannot refuse a royal order.

But if by some miracle they can pull it all off, the King’s Brew Winter Edition will have something special that no other beer in the kingdom has ever possessed.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Brew Master 3
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Summer in Hagop means hot days spent by the river fishing, swimming, and fun in the sun.

But it won’t be a lazy summer for Tyler, since he has multiple deadlines to meet: craft the perfect light summer beer to drink by the river, travel to the spice islands with Princess Julliette to find a kola nut so he can brew a knockout non-alcoholic carbonated soda for his very pregnant fiancées, and finally dealing with unscrupulous tax evading and kidnapping pirates.

It’s a lot to do in a little amount of time, but nothing can stop Tyler and his faithful pal Babble the Gnome from accomplishing their dreams.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Brew Master 4
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Tyler King made his name in the idyllic town of Hagop by winning the harvest festival beer competition in the greatest upset imaginable.

But a year has passed and the competition is coming back again. The brewer must continue to innovate and deliver a brand new craft beer the likes of which Hagop has never seen to fend off the scheming dwarves once and for all.

Beyond all that there is the small matter of Princess Juliette: Tyler, a commoner, cannot marry her without becoming ennobled. Unfortunately there are only a few paths for a commoner to become an aristocrat. One is success in war. The other is completing a heroic quest like, say, slaying a mighty dragon.

Can Tyler, a human brew master accompanied by a gnomish squire, really take down a dragon?

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Brew Master 5
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Sir Tyler’s son, Hugh, is just like any other baby… if every other infant also displayed an aptitude for magical abilities.

Tyler and Flora determine that their baby deserves a proper wizard’s education when he gets older, and they decide to take him to the Isle of Feather: a rebellious, green country full of mythical creatures, legal magic, beer, and luck.

Getting Hugh admitted to the Wizard’s Academy will be the least of their troubles when Tyler gets caught in a conspiracy to foment dissent between the locals and outsiders.

Tyler, with the help of Rheingold, Babble, Flora, and Princess Julliette will try to end centuries of bad blood between the the Isle of Feather and the rest of Rothbart the only way he knows how: brewing a new, dark, and luscious beer that nobody-- local or foreign-- could deny.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Brew Master 6
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

I was a good person in my life, at least I tried to be, but despite my good intentions, I’ve ended up in Hell, and it’s nothing like what I’d thought.

The nine levels of Hell have been divided and separated, and now they’re at serious risk from some unknown force. Monstrous creatures have started to invade and kill the queen’s redeemable citizens, and things are looking bad… even for Hell.

But apparently, I’m the guy who can fix everything.

All I have to do is somehow reunite the nine Demon Queens who hate each other and defeat the greatest evil Hell has ever seen.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
seriesName: Bride Tamer of the Nine Hells
title: Bride Tamer of the Nine Hells
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

I used to be a computer programmer… I think.

But then I woke up in a strange new world as a… god? Part of me thinks this is some ultra-realistic VR game, but things just seem and feel too real.
Especially the three beautiful priestesses who have traveled from afar just to worship and love me.

I don’t know what’s going on, but as their god, it is my job to protect them, and the only way to do that is to level up by teaching them how to survive and build in this brutal wilderness.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Building Harem Town
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

I still don’t know why I’m in this strange fantasy world, but three beautiful priestesses are counting on me to protect them, provide for them, and impregnate them.
I am their god, so I can’t let them down.

Memories of my past are scattered, but I recall the basics of survival and building. Every small step brings me new powers and abilities I can grant my faithful… and closer to figuring out who I actually am.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Building Harem Town 2
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

I have no idea how or why I’ve become a god, or if any of this is even real, but my three beautiful priestesses certainly seem real, and they rely on me to watch over them, guide them, and impregnate them with my god-seed. Now, more devout followers have joined with my convent. My flock is growing along with my power, and my priestesses are more and more eager to worship my godly form.

But there are other beautiful women in this strange fantasy world who are desperately in need of my holy guidance, and I must save them.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Building Harem Town 3
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

I’m finally getting the hang of this god thing. My beautiful priestesses worship me every chance they get, my convent is expanding every day, and my holy powers keep on building.

Now all I have to do is save an entire town and wage a battle against the largest threat we’ve ever faced. Luckily, it looks like I’m about to gain more loyal followers than I ever dreamed I’d have, but the question is… can I actually steal followers from another god?

Are there even other gods out there, or am I the only true god in this world?

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Building Harem Town 4
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

It looks like the threat of an enemy god is a lot closer to home than I realized. It’s time for my loyal priestesses and I to expand my territory, build up my armies, and take on the strange beasts who prowl the northern forest.
But there’s more lurking in these woods than I anticipated. New mysteries are coming to light, and it turns out this strange god life I woke up to involves some unexpected challenges.
Not to mention, unexpected powers.

author: Eric Vall

I’ve finally taken over the entire enchanted forest, and the northern boundary of my vast territory now rests at the base of the mountains, right alongside Ethan’s reign. But deciding how to handle this next god will take some finesse. He’s smarter, stronger, and more cunning than my last holy opponent, and it seems he’s hiding all kinds of secrets in his mountains.
Not to mention, an exotic woman who refuses to submit to his rule.
So what do I stand to gain if she submits to me instead?

author: Eric Vall

OVERVIEW:

It’s time to really Level Up.

Now that I’ve claimed Ethan’s territory for my own, three more gods have me cornered in the north, and they’re nothing like the ones I’ve taken on so far.

Their armies are bigger, bloodier, and more varied than I expected. But facing them will mean I finally gain the ultimate upper hand in these holy wars.

And find out how I got here at last.

title: Building Harem Town 7
author: Eric Vall

OVERVIEW:

The countdown has begun.

Only five enemy gods remain, but they’ll be our most brutal opponents yet.

And there’s every chance these holy wars could destroy the world.

It’s time for my loyal priestesses and I to lead a fight like no other, but with the power gangs we’re making lately, it looks like it’s going to be a crazy, magical ride on my way to becoming the Almighty.

title: Building Harem Town 8
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

Only two enemy gods stand between me and my reign as the Almighty God.

Their massive armies might be straight out of a horror film, but I have more than half the world at my back, my loyal priestesses at my sides, and a system to conquer once and for all.

And if I can free the most ancient city in the world, I’ll have every power I need to finish this holy war at last.

The time to ascend has finally come.

author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

Destroyer of Peace, Scorcher of Lives, that’s what they called me.

All I wanted was to enjoy my treasure hoard, as any dragon would, but King Balan simply couldn’t allow me to live in peace. Now he’s sent me to this strange new world of Chicago, but what he didn’t expect was for me to thrive in here.

With the help of a few unlikely human friends, I will conquer the business world and rebuild a new hoard of money, status, and women.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Business Dragon
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The evil mage who sent me to Earth has targeted my new world, but he’s about to learn that a dragon can only be tested for so long before the inevitable wrath is due.

And this time, I’m seeking more than just victory over the monsters Astrum is sending here.

I’m after answers, and a hefty dose of justice for a certain gorgeous electrician who’s been desperately trying to track me down.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Business Dragon 2
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

My quest to conquer the business world of Earth is coming along nicely, but my thirst for more money, status, and women has only increased.

Taking on our most lucrative job yet is the ideal next step, but it will require making the proper connections among the high-end suppliers of Chicago.

If only the threat of an incoming banshee wasn’t pulling me away from my work at this very moment, and straight into the claws of some truly Hellish terrors.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Business Dragon 3
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

My contracting business is finally catching the eye of Chicago’s wealthiest residents, but a dragon is never satisfied with only a little bit of conquering.

My own personal interests and goals are expanding by the day, and it’s time to make some choice investments and start reaping the benefits of what I’ve built so far on Earth.

But danger seems to find me no matter what the circumstances.

And for the first time since arriving in this strange world, it looks like the evil stalking these streets may not have come from my neck of the woods at all.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Business Dragon 4
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The virus hit three years ago.

It rendered most of the human race unable to digest any protein, and people began to die off in droves… until the PharmA Corporation made a hideous discovery: they could still digest meat if the victim was part of the small portion of humanity that was immune to the virus.

PharmA and their “rations” stabilized society from collapsing completely, but at an untold cost: an industrial scale human farming operation to provide human flesh to the masses. Even worse, the virus gave the infected a hideous side effect: superhuman strength, speed, and toughness.

I was one of the immune ones, but I was riding all this out on my cattle ranch in the country, safely ignored by the rest of humanity. Unfortunately, trouble managed to find me, and now I’m drawn into a war against people who want to eat me and my loved ones.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Cannibal Country
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Being the maintenance man at the college I’d graduated from wasn’t the most glamorous life, but it paid the bills.

Today was supposed to be an average day of work followed by a night camping in the woods. But my whole world got turned upside down when the entire building was suddenly transported to some crazy fantasy land, with me and five beautiful college coeds still inside.

Now they’re all looking at me to keep us alive in this insane and dangerous new world filled with creatures beyond my wildest imagination.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon

Life in Tullia had been difficult from the very beginning, but the women of Woodhouse have been by my side every step of the way.

Now, finally, after months and months of planning, recruiting people, and gaining allies, it’s finally time to bring the hostile reign of Emperor Marcus Constantine to an end.

We’re as ready as we can be, with support and troops from all the provinces across Tullia. We’ve got the last dragon on our side, but will it be enough to bring down the evil that nearly wiped out all of dragonkind?

I never expected to end up in a crazy place filled with unicorns, dragons, and magic. It’s certainly not an easy place to live, and we have a lot to learn if we’re going to survive at all.

Between the beasts that roam the Waste at night, and the hostile soldiers of Castilan, the women and I have to be on guard at all times.

Thankfully, they’re just as determined to stay alive as I am, and an unexpected ally might be the thing that changes it all.

The dragon-woman’s request to help her kill Emperor Constantine was not what I’d been expecting, but it’s a challenge we’re willing to take on to help Tevai after what she’s done for us.

But first, we need to help Tevai recover her weapons, artifacts, and whatever knowledge she can from a priestess in Shanukstan.

Asha, Arden, Tevai, and I are in for one heck of a journey through the mountains, and that’s just the beginning of what lies ahead of us.

Life just keeps getting weirder in Tullia. We recovered Tevai’s belongings and brought home a priestess who can see visions as a bonus, and she almost immediately dropped a bomb on us.

There’s another dragon, deep in the blighted, diseased Outlands, and we must go find it.

Now our dangerous quest to kill the emperor will lead us into the ruined lands beyond the enormous, impassible, and possible sentient Barricade. But if we can find another dragon, it will all be worth it.

The dragon is dead, and our hope of recruiting him to our cause is lost, but our intentions to help Tevai kill the Emperor will have to wait.

Khan is out for vengeance, and he’s coming to take what he thinks is his.

The warlord will stop at nothing to take Kryze back and make her his wife, but I’m not about to let that happen. It’s a mad dash to build up our defenses and prepare for battle.

Life has been pretty peaceful since I defeated the warlord Khan and saved Kryze from being forced into marrying him. But it won’t last.

Kryze’s cousin, Bahdir, soon arrives with a host of Shanukstani tribespeople who’ve decided to come live in the Waste with us, but that’s just the start of what’s ahead of us.

Now we have to venture into Castilan in hopes of arranging a meeting with the low king to try and convince him to side with us to overthrow the emperor. What could possibly go wrong?

I hadn’t expected to see Akoni again so soon, but now she’s on my doorstep asking for my help to stop the corruption that’s been spreading through the Outlands for decades.

I probably would have helped her just because I wanted to, but when she offers me a slice of her magic, there’s no way I can say no.

A gigantic centipede snake is only the start of our troubles in the cannibal-filled land, and our journey to the Black Tower is anything but simple.

author: Eric Vall

OVERVIEW:

The Shanukstani are settling in quite comfortably outside my castle walls, and Bahdir has been out recruiting more people to our cause.

Now, if our meeting with Owain’s father goes well, we can start gathering more forces from Lydmark as well. But the Emperor will have to wait.

The corrupted magic of the Outlands isn’t finished with us yet. Something has torn down the Barricade, and it’s up to us to make sure the beasts and cannibals don’t wreak havoc on the rest of Tullia.

I hadn’t expected Andamora to show up unannounced on our doorstep, but what she needs help with is even more surprising. Some witch has cursed King Lavino, and he’s lost the ability to speak.

But King Lavino isn’t the only situation on my plate at the moment. An urgent note leads us to a clandestine meeting at the Towers with a woman who works for Lydmark’s Low King.

Then we head off through Castilan on a hunt for the witch to stop her and her curse on King Lavino, and I can only hope we’re not too late.

description:
OVERVIEW:

Damaged. Disgraced. Dishonored.
And the only hero who can save seven worlds.

When a freak accident ruins his body and his memory, Wes Malcolm loses his scholarship and his place in the world. Every treatment has failed, save one: a fully immersive VR game, designed by his late, disgraced father, that mimics the condition his body used to possess. To everyone's disbelief, his body and mind slowly improve, bit by bit, but it's still not enough.

Then one night, he wakes up in a world just like the game his father designed. Here, he can grow, learn, and thrive. But this world and all its sister planets are under assault from nightmare creatures, supernatural storms, and a host of other cataclysms. The strange, beautiful steward of these worlds offers him a deal: Save her planets, and he can take the power he gains back to his original body on Earth. It's the best chance he's ever been offered. But will his determination be enough, both for himself and the worlds now depending on him?

Come and find out.

OVERVIEW:

All I wanted to do was see my escape room business succeed, but then a friggin’ demon showed up in Boston to tear my place apart, and I ended up tumbling into another world.
One I’ve actually heard of.
Now, I’m fighting my way through Asgard with the survivors of Ragnarok, and I’ve somehow gained some pretty wild shifter powers. It looks like these people could use a guy as clever as me if they wanna stay alive, but my wits aren’t the only thing I’m bringing to the table.
It’ll take that and a lot more to survive in this demon-infested world, but I’ve always thrived in a bit of chaos.

Surviving the aftermath of Ragnarok has been my main priority since I arrived on Asgard, but then I claimed an entire castle to my name. Now, I’m Lord Levi, and I’ve got bigger schemes in mind.

There’s a whole forest of resources at my disposal, and it turns out these lands aren’t as untouched by the mayhem as they appear. Unimaginable dangers are lurking within these trees, and a clan of mysterious survivors are being held captive in the chaos.

But nothing’s gonna keep me from using everything I’ve got to my advantage here, especially with my shifter powers developing more each day.

But not all resources can be found within the deadly forest.

It’s time to venture out into this demon-infested world, and what we find in the north is the last thing we ever expected.

Unfortunately, new magical threats are afoot up here, and it’s going to take new weaponry, new allies, and new shifter powers to overcome.

But my loyal warriors and women would follow me into the bowels of Hell if I asked them to.

And I thrive on this sort of chaos.

So it’s time to take the biggest risks to reap the biggest rewards.

The gaping chasm of Helheim has finally been conquered, but Ragnarok has left more scars in Asgard’s crust than I’d thought.

Now, another evil lurks to the south of Castle Levi, and a strange group of survivors have struggled to defeat the frigid threat that’s closing in.

But gathering loyal followers has become as natural as breathing to me. Every moment I spend in this demon-infested world seems to bring me closer and closer to my destiny.

And these new magical beings could help me discover the secrets of my own rare powers.

Whispers of evil are calling out from the depths of Niflheim. The most brutal secrets of the Aesir are coming to light, but with every step I take toward this grim and icy battle, I become more undone.

Something inside me is warring to be unleashed.

And it’s time to succumb to the chaos.

For Asgard, for my many lovers, and for the fate of the Nine Realms.

Now that I’ve succumbed to the powers within me, I’m more in tune with the magical workings of my homeland than ever before.

The scales are rapidly tipping toward utter chaos, and forcing the chasms into balance is proving to be my greatest test yet.

Surtr is running rampant across the universe. His fury could unleash chaos as unrelenting as Ragnarok on every corner of the Nine Realms.
But I am God King of these worlds now. I am the Allfather, and I will protect all of my subjects.
Whether they know of my existence yet, or not.
Unfortunately, portaling across the universe in the wake of a primordial giant isn’t an easy task. It’ll take the strength of all my combined powers, the devotion of my many lovers, and the determination of my loyal followers to bring peace to the Nine Realms at last.
Not to mention, a pretty incredible array of rainbow bridges.
Time to see the rest of my vast kingdom and save all worlds.

title: Chaos God 8
author: Eric Vall

description:
My name is Frank Butcher, and evidently when you save the world, it comes back for seconds.

After I stopped a world ending apocalypse, my allies tried to cut open my chest with an axe. Kind of messed up, if you ask me.

Thankfully, I’ve got a chance to return the favor. And I’m going to take it. Not because they’re trying to magically reshape the natural laws that govern our planet. No, I’m doing this because trying to cut out my heart is not okay.
title: Clans of Shadow 2: Feet of Clay
author: J.A. Cipriano

description:
Remember what I said about saving the world? Yeah, apparently the third time is the charm.

Turns out our little plan to stop the apocalypse left the gate open for some bastards straight out of HP Lovecraft. Now they’ve come on through to try to turn the planet into an all you can eat buffet.

That’s not exactly my jam, so if I want to go on living here, I’ll need to find a way to stop them.

My name is Frank Butcher, and one way or another, I’m putting an end to this once and for all.
title: Clans of Shadow 3: Fists of Iron
author: J.A. Cipriano

description:
My name is Frank Butcher, and when I got out of my truck to deliver the last package of the day, I never expected to get blown up by anti-magic zealots.

Yeah, you heard me right. I said magic. I didn’t know it was a thing either.

Now, an ancient artifact is the only thing keeping me alive, and to make matters worse, that artifact is what those cultists wanted.

Still, I could have made a run for it, disappeared down into South America and spent the rest of my life on a beach. I nearly did it, but I didn’t.

Why? Because the cultists have offered me a trade. Come to them or they start killing kids.
title: Clans of Shadow: Heart of Gold
author: J.A. Cipriano

description:
OVERVIEW:

This gorgeous vampire princess hates me, but that’s probably because the prophecy foretells that she must bear my children…

One day, I was just a park ranger in Idaho. I liked my job, but my life wasn’t particularly exciting.

Then I fell into an underground spring and landed in another world.

A fantasy world full of vampires, shifters, and monsters.

Turns out I’m the prophesied shifter who is destined to unite the different paranormal species by killing all my rivals, marrying and breeding with all of the noble firstborn daughters, and establishing my own kingdom.

I’m no longer just Eli the park ranger. Now, I’m Eli the prophesized Ulvant, the multi-shifter who is supposed to bring peace to both the vampire and shifter kingdoms.

By taking on multiple wives and breeding with them.

The vampire princess isn’t quite taken with me yet, but she also won’t let my shifter lover and I journey alone to the shifter capital, so I plan to get under the vampiress’ skin one way or another…

Life for the fabled Ulvant shifter is never dull.

I’ve only been in the shifter kingdom for a few days, but I’ve already gone on a quest to save the king, battled an army of monsters, and killed an evil wizard.

But the work isn’t over yet.

Tensions are still high in Shyfeterran, and it’s up to me to bring peace to the shifters.

As their newly crowned prince.

To do that, I must find six talismans to fulfill a prophecy.

And the bear talisman is the one I’ve set my sights on next.

Now that I’ve made allies of the Night Folk and obtained the bear talisman, I’m one step closer to fulfilling my destiny as the Ulvant, the prophesied savior who is supposed to bring balance back to the realms.

But then I received word from the vampire king and queen that something nefarious is happening back in the kingdom of Vosreterra.

Apparently, thieves have broken into the vampires’ sacred vaults, and it’s up to me to recover what was lost.

Things have settled down in the vampire kingdom of Vosreterra, especially since I’m officially marrying their princess, Calantha.

But then Lor, the fairy servant who’s been around since I was first summoned to this world, drops a bomb on me.

Apparently, Lor is a princess, too, and she’s been on the run and hiding for years. But her kingdom and her mother are in grave danger, so she’s begging me, the Ulvant, for help.

And I’m not about to let her down, so Faetyran here we come.

The Ulvant has saved another realm, and Faetyran has begun the process of rebuilding.
But my work as this world’s savior is not done yet.
The territory of the elves is also in need of some help. A mysterious figure known only as “the Master” has been traveling through the elven territory with a caravan of performers. But every time they leave a town, children seem to go missing.
And there are rumors of stolen souls.

Ever since I fell through a portal and arrived in this magical fantasy land, I’ve had my work cut out for me. I’ve embraced my role as the Ulvant, the prophesied savior of this world, and I’ve traveled the realms to help where I could. I’ve managed to stabilize and tentatively unite the kingdoms of Vosreterra, Shyfeterran, Faetyran, and the Elvarian League of Forests.

But Malonet, the vampire sorcerer who has made many attempts on my life, is still out there.

And now I believe he’s hiding out in the abandoned dwarven kingdom.

It’s time for the Ulvant to put an end to the sorcerer’s evil.

description:
OVERVIEW:

Cooking has always been my passion, but at forty-nine years old, I’ve come to terms with the fact that not everyone can appreciate a truly magnificent dish.

Until I walked straight into the magical world of Innothlig.

Here, the gods are worshiped through food, and only the most talented chefs can hold their own at the prestigious and highly competitive cooking academies.

I don’t know how I ended up in this world, or how I’m suddenly back in my twenty-five-year-old body.

All I know is that these fantastical women are gorgeous, the magic is wilder than I could have imagined, and life is going to be absolutely delicious from here on out.

I’ve succeeded more than most people in Innothlig would have guessed.

I’m a Journeyman now, and with the new rank, comes new challenges and all the same prejudices of this world.

Despite so many things being stacked against me, I’m determined to use every bit of culinary skill I have to prove myself.

Now, a new and exciting assignment from my tutors at House Siggwin will challenge my skills in the kitchen and my patience more than I could have imagined.

Life in Innothlig hasn’t been easy for me, but I’m determined to face every challenge with integrity and a growing faith in the gods of this world.


Now the glorious Golden Goose has been spotted for the first time in more than a century, and everyone in Hid is in an absolute uproar about it.


Only the most dedicated and pious delegation will be able to earn the bounty of the golden egg. But wooing the Goose isn’t the only challenge before me, do I have what it takes?

But with the approach of autumn, comes another god’s festival day.

I was expecting a peaceful few days of worship and a bit of cooking at the Os, but an unexpected invitation could be the chance I have to prove myself to the people of Innothlig.

The City of Hid is about to celebrate Winter Solstice, and our exams are complete, but the break from my studies means the wealthy families of Hid are chomping at the bit for a chance to have me cater their winter holiday parties.

But everything is put on the line when there’s a sudden lack of any swincnuts in the entire city.

There’s only one place in all of Hid where I might be able to get some swincnuts in time to save my reputation: Bennlaeth Miht’s warehouse.

During my time in Hid, I’ve learned so much about wicfood and the process of cooking for the gods. It had surprised me when I’d been permitted to advance to Journeyman status early, and I hadn’t expected to be allowed such a privilege again.

I know I have the skills, but will the prejudices against humans stop me from achieving my dreams?

Life was simple, but it was good. I kept to myself, ran my gaming shop in the town I’d grown up in, and business was pretty good.

That was until bizarre things started happening. I could have sworn I heard something breathing in my basement right before I woke up in my bed with no memory of the time between. My high school crush suddenly comes back to town, and hot but crazy women are coming into my shop like never before.

What is happening in Wormwood, and what’s it got to do with me?

Wormwood was never going to be the same. That had been made clear the day a mushroom girl appeared out of the basement of my comic book and gaming shop.

Now her presence in the town is drawing all kinds of magic users and strange creatures to town, and people are getting sick and dropping like flies.

Something dangerous is happening in town, and I won’t relax until we figure it out.

author: Eric Vall

Things in Wormwood have been quiet since the Three first appeared in town due to the homicidal efforts of a Mithridate, but finally, the time for their assembly has come.

We need to get a handle on the crazies coming to town in search of the magical power source, but more importantly, we need to keep Chantrelle safe.

That becomes significantly harder with so many magic users lurking around, and the Three’s assembly soon reveals an even more urgent issue

The trees are dropping their leaves without changing color, cracks are opening all over the place, and Chanterelle discovers a dangerous absence of magic in the ground.

Then the earthquakes begin. I just hope we can figure out what is happening before someone gets killed.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon

Things in Wormwood have been quiet, but Halloween is just around the corner. It’s not all that surprising that a bunch of weird things start happening right before the witchy holiday.

After a gourd busts its way out of the floorboards of my shop, my friends and I are on high alert, and things only get more complicated when cryptids start popping up in town.

I never expected to see Bigfoot strolling through the edge of town, but that’s barely the start of the problems.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Dangerous Girls 5
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

There’s never a boring time in Wormwood, and right after Halloween is no exception, as much as I’d love a little peace and quiet.

But serpents are falling from the sky, and Chanterelle has some incredible news I never would have expected.

My hands are way fuller than they’ve ever been, and the town is overflowing with cryptids. My friends and I have got to figure out what is happening and stop whoever is causing all the chaos in town.

title: Dangerous Girls 6
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

Life was going so well right up until I got caught in the crossfire of two supers battling, took a manhole cover to the face at 200 miles per hour, and died.

That’s when things got weird.

I woke up, fully healed, and with diamond hard skin that was impervious to blunt force damage. Turns out I’m a super, too. Only my power is the ability to come back from the dead, and with a new ability that makes me immune to whatever just killed me.

They say whatever doesn’t kill you makes you stronger, but in my case, whatever kills me makes me stronger.

I’m going to be the most famous and powerful superhero on Earth, get all the girls, and put an end to the super villains’ reign of terror.

Or die trying.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on EricVall.com
title: Death Makes Me Stronger
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

Every time I die, I come back to life with a new superpower that makes me immune to whatever killed me. I’ve died a bunch of times now, and I’m becoming one of the most powerful supers on the planet.

I’m gonna need to be.

Some criminal mastermind has created a serum that turns normal people into supers temporarily, and is using them to create a state of terror in the city. It’s not clear what his ultimate goal is, but with the help of my allies and lovers, we’ll do our best to shut him down.

I only hope I’ve died enough times to save everybody.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on EricVall.com
title: Death Makes Me Stronger 2
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

The Mastermind is flooding the city with the illegal super-drug Vis, and the rampaging army of strung out supers is threatening to tear the city apart. The only people who can stop it are me and my Heroes Society allies.

Unfortunately, Admiral Freedom has been framed to be responsible for the Vis by the Mastermind, so the government and people have lost their faith in us.

Sure, nothing can kill me permanently, but what’s the point of coming back from the dead when everyone I know and love is killed by the Mastermind’s deadly plan? I’ll need to take my abilities to a new level for everyone to make it out of this alive.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on EricVall.com
title: Death Makes Me Stronger 3
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

With the world’s greatest superhero, Admiral Freedom, murdered and framed for distributing the super-creating drug Vis, there is only one person who can stop the Mastermind.

Me. Osiris, the invincible one.

But it’s not me I’m worried about. If he kills me, I’ll just come back, stronger than before. I’m worried about the 24 hours it will take to resurrect and what he will do to my friends, lovers, and the whole world in the meantime. I don’t want to die only to come back to a world not worth living in.

So when we have our final faceoff, it’s going to be him or me, once and for all.

title: Death Makes Me Stronger 4
author: Eric Vall

description:
When Sergeant Jay Lucas is snatched away from his family farm by a diabolical sentient spaceship, he thought his life was over. But when his AI captor pumps Jay full of an insanely powerful liquid metal armor, he soon discovers the kidnapping was only the beginning of his trials.

As the bloodthirsty AI trains Jay to harvest souls and increase the duo’s power, Jay learns there is a whole universe of bad guys who need killing. And when Jay’s unwavering moral compass puts him at odds with the plans of an alien mercenary company, he’s soon on the run with a gorgeous space princess.

All Jay has is a shit-talking spaceship, advanced combat boosting armor, and a trio of beautiful warrior women.

The odds aren’t in his favor, but that’s just how this Marine likes his cards dealt.

Looks like it’s time for some violence, mayhem, and game-changing upgrades from the ever-hungry Soulforge.

Note: This title does not allow MP3 downloads

author: Michael-Scott Earle

After discovering an upgrades panel accessible only through the Heart of Solrael, gathering more of the elusive artifacts has become top priority. Especially now that it seems the Dominion has a similar interest in the artifacts.

Unfortunately, the next one is tucked so deep into enemy territory that Jay and his crew may as well be flying straight into Satan’s asscrack to get it.

Oorah, dipshits. Let’s do this.

description:

But the hidden world of demon book collectors is dangerous: those who possess demons want more to add to their power, and those who do not will pay any cost to possess one.

Now Chris faces the ultimate temptation. Should he give up the book and resume his safe and ordinary life, or bind the demoness to him and enter a world where only the most cunning and deadly survive?

Success means wealth, power, and women beyond comprehension. Failure means a brutal death and eternal damnation.
