The king’s appointed Sentinels are missing, there is evidence the Green Glass Sect is once again up to no good, and the city’s Council of Magistrates is more than a little suspicious.

Evan decides to go undercover to get to the bottom of all these mysteries, but a little dragon diplomacy may be in order.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Dragon Emperor 9
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

On August 6, 1945 the United States showed the world the results of their secret Manhattan Project, and the Japanese city of Hiroshima was destroyed with a cataclysm of fire by a pair of three-hundred-ton dragons they hatched, grew, and trained in the desert.

With the unstoppable power of dragons on our side, World War 2 came to a quick end. Unfortunately it wasn’t long until the communist Soviets got their hands on dragon eggs and birthed their own arsenal of dragons.

Now it’s 2025, the Cold War is still raging, the world is on the brink, and America’s best defense is still its dragons.

Jake Randall is a freshman at the United States Dragon Corps Academy, where he and other students, the best of the best, will train to be an elite dragon pilot. If Jake can balance his classwork, taming his dragon, the girls vying for his attention, and his rival pilots, he might just get his wings.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Dragon Flight Academy
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

Life has returned to normal at the DCA after the Soviet invasion of American airspace, and Jake Randall and his fellow cadets are working hard to survive their classes and their flight training. The Cold War is in the background again, until a pair of FBI agents and a Senator’s aide turn up at the Academy, claiming there’s a spy among the cadets.

What started as a prank has turned into an investigation, and everything is about to be turned upside down again. The one saving grace? A chance to fly with Dragon Corps members at a base in the Pacific.

But in this world, things are never straightforward or simple, and Russian dragons are always lurking nearby.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Dragon Flight Academy 2
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

Summer is here, and class is out at the DCA. Most students are sent home for some rest and relaxation, but Jake and Brie are chosen to take their dragons to West Germany and experience life on the front line of the iron curtain with a NATO Dragon Corps unit.

Disaster strikes for Jake and Brie when they get stranded deep into Soviet territory and they will have to battle against the elements while evading communist patrols. If they are captured, they’ll be sent to a POW camp and their dragons taken by the enemy. The Americans can’t send forces across the border without sparking a war, so they have to get home on their own.

Getting back to Allied territory alive will take all their survival training and combat prowess, as well as courage in the face of impossible odds. America is counting on them.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Dragon Flight Academy 3
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

When Jake and Storm are selected to join the American and South Korean troops on the frontline near the DMZ with North Korea, it’s an amazing opportunity. He’ll experience combat exercises with veteran dragon riders, testing cutting edge next-gen technology, and most importantly, get some unforgettable local hospitality.

But the DMZ is a dangerous place where all hell could break loose at any moment, and when both sides have hotshot dragon riders itching for a fight, it just might. Storm is growing to be a large and powerful dragon, and Jake is becoming an experienced rider, but can he really fight a veteran North Korean dragon ace and his full grown dragon if he had to?

The Cold War is a pressure cooker, and things are getting hotter each day. If one small spark can start a world war, what could an errant fireball from a dragon start?

author: Eric Vall

Chicago firefighter Ethan DePaolo expected to die when a flaming building collapsed on him during a rescue. Instead, he was teleported away by the watchful god of a fantasy world and asked to be a hero once more.

Armed with magic tattoos and his trusty fireman’s axe, Ethan sets out to rid this new world of the dragon scourge. But when his magic works in unexpected ways, he learns he has unmatched power to dominate his winged serpent enemies.

Or anyone else that stands in his way.

title: Dragon Slayer

Chicago firefighter Ethan DePaolo saved the kingdom of Whitespire from the dragons of fire and frost, but when word of an approaching horde controlled by both a blue and green dragon reaches them, the dragon slayer knows that Whitespire will need more help.

Their only chance is the distant city of Windwall, but they have problems of their own, since the devious black dragon Emroth has laid siege to the city for generations, and the citizens have given up all hope of ever defeating their enemy.

Fortunately for them, Ethan knows a thing or two about defeating dragons.

His enemies believe they will win with sheer numbers, but Ethan now has the help of three beautiful dragon-women on his side, and when the going gets tough, Ethan will do whatever he must in order to save his new home and the women he loves.

Ethan DePaolo and his beautiful sorceresses have left the continent of Iriador behind and soared all the way to Nardane, where the Temple of Vostok promises the answers he’s been desperately seeking.

But what the priestesses have in store for him will propel him into his most dangerous quest yet.

Ethan will have to face demons and dragons he never could have imagined, armed only with his hard-earned magical powers, his beautiful dragon companions, and a new rough-and-tumble crew of fighters.

author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
Ethan DePaolo never imagined he’d see his homeworld again, but now he’s back for a front row seat to the utter destruction of Earth.

At least, that was Barodan’s plan.

With his incredible dragon women in tow, and after the return of a certain flirtatious friend, Ethan is confident he can save his world. He just has to figure out where on the entire planet Barodan’s mystery dragon could be lurking.

Not to mention, he’ll need to keep his own magical abilities under wraps, make enough money to get by on Earth, and prevent his lethal ladies from getting into too much trouble during the minion apocalypse.

NOTE: This title does not allow MP3 downloads
title: Dragon Slayer 7
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
Saving Earth from utter destruction was no easy feat for Ethan DePaolo and his fierce dragon women, but there isn’t time to bask in the gratitude of his beloved homeworld.

Barodan thinks he’s gotten away with banishing the Dragonrider from Agreon for good, and Ethan intends to swiftly show him the error of his ways.

But Agreon isn’t as safe as it was when Ethan left it.

Something strange and chaotic has taken hold in his absence, and the person he may need the most is imprisoned in her stone cage for eternity.

title: Dragon Slayer 8

description:
OVERVIEW:

Charlie was ready to finally enjoy his freedom after graduating college. Then he woke up in a strange, otherworldly forest filled with unspeakable terrors.

And dragons.

Things only got weirder from there.

Slaying the first dragon he met meant absorbing its spirit, so now he’s signed on as a recruit at a magical, cut-throat academy as he tries to train and wield his mystical dragon companion in combat.

Success won’t be easy, and learning the ins and outs of monster slaying is a messy business.

But it’ll all be worth it if he can make it into the Legion and serve at the front lines in this war against wild spirits, ravenous monsters, and the thinning veils that separate their world from the magical Sundered Realm.

OVERVIEW:

Charlie’s finally hitting his stride in the magical Sundered Realm. He’s got a gorgeous and witty mentor to keep him busier than ever, a group of fantasy beings for best friends, and a beautiful and talented girlfriend.

But the threat of a vicious Blood Dragon looms over him, and if he’s going to assist the Legion in this deadly mission, he’s going to need some special training.

It won’t be easy convincing one of the most elusive races in the world to meet with him and lend a hand, but the secrets they hold inside their ancient walls could change everything.

And also provide some much needed answers about Charlie’s mysterious shadow powers.

Charlie was the first person in the Sundered Realm to ever gain a dragon rovkin. Now, it looks like he’s the first to gain a second rovkin as well.

Teaching this blood-dripping, acid-spewing, vicious menace of a dragon to work with the team will take a creative approach, but that’s a problem Charlie will have to deal with on the road.

Scholars from the elite Arbor School are in need of a particular kind of assistance, and the General believes Charlie and his friends might be the perfect cadets to escort them while they investigate the trouble with the veil.

So, with his two lovers and his best friends at his side, it’s time for Charlie to see how the mage cadets in the south live.

Then everything gets more complicated when glyphs are located near the war-torn city of Odrunata. Charlie and his fellow cadets are tasked with accompanying the group who will locate, attempt to decipher, and ultimately destroy the glyphs.

Charlie hopes to help however he can, but things go sideways when they have to travel into the Shadow Realm.

Charlie has everyone worried now that he’s pushed far beyond what should be the limits of a human spirit. But wielding so many dark powers and dragons still hasn’t slowed him down.

In fact, he’s never been stronger.

That’s what unnerves him most.

When an unprecedented call for help from the Kingdom of Moon Elves sends the realm reeling, answers begin to surface at last, and Charlie is forced to confront whether his unique powers are turning him into a force for good or for evil.

My name is Volrath, and I am an Aesir of Asgard.

I have no family name to speak of, but then I discovered I could tame, train, and breed the great dragons that are feared throughout Asgard. Now that I have this incredible power, it is my mission to scour the nine realms in search of more dragons to add to my menagerie.

I am joined by a beautiful Light Elf and a powerful half-Valkyrie sorceress, and these women want to bind themselves to me and bear my children.

This is the start of my legacy, and my journey to sit beside Odin and Freya as the greatest warrior mage Asgard has ever seen.

And more dragons.

But I, and the beautiful warrior women at my side, will not rest until the trade, enslavement, and hatred of dragons is wiped out of all the realms.
Even if we have to do it behind Odin’s back.

With the help of my dragons and my warrior women, I will restore peace to the realms.

For dragons and Asgardians alike.

When Ollie discovers he can enter peoples’ dreams, go on fantastic adventures, and help them overcome their troubles, he didn’t think he’d end up on the path to riches. His treatment means his patients fall in love with him afterwards, and now Ollie is suddenly on every wealthy person’s list as the “magic dream man” who can fix any mental health issue.

And rich, famous people have a lot of mental health issues.

Unfortunately, any harm Ollie experiences in a dream affects him in real life, so the reward doesn’t come risk free. Even more unsettling, when Ollie notices something in common with every nightmare scenario, it hints at something far more sinister at play in the world…

Unfortunately, Ollie has noticed patterns repeating in the dreams of all his patients, and these clues point to a sinister conspiracy lurking at the root cause of the world’s mental health crises. When the master of dreams puts the pieces together, he’ll find out the horrible secret that threatens the future of the human race itself.

This portal led to a fantastical world full of monsters, magic, dungeons, and the ability to level up my attributes, weapon, and armor stats.

There are still other cursed women who are trapped in various weapons and pieces of armor, and monsters continue to terrorize the people of Hadden. Plus, I’ve begun to suspect the Baron’s soothsayer might not be all he appears…

And get paid handsomely while doing it.

And no monster or evil overlord is going to stop me.

I’ve killed several of his minions now, and I’m so close to completing the set of magical armor and weapons that house the spirits of five beautiful women.

But as I search the dungeons for answers, I’m finding more and more questions about my past…

Or… Would you kill all of his supporters, take his riches and kingdom for yourself, and rip every last ounce of stolen power from his body?

Colton Davis has always dreamed of living a life of adventure like the treasure hunters he’s read about, but he never imagined he’d find even more than that.
Then one geocaching excursion thrust him into a magical world filled with deadly jungles, valuable artifacts, and ancient temples.
But raiding these mysterious temples isn’t for the faint of heart. Once he enters, every moment could be his last, and the promise of reward has led thousands to their deaths within these ever-changing halls.
So it’s no wonder why so many here are willing to go to murderous lengths just to gain the most valuable asset an adventurer could find: An eidolon. The rarest female beings in all of Fablewild.

But the temples and challenges are getting harder, and Colton’s growing notoriety is starting to gain unwanted attention, both in Fablewild and back home on Earth.

Can Colton keep his eidolons safe from those who would kill him to take their power for their own?

My eidolons and I are riding the high of success, but now it’s time to follow through on a promise.

Gylbart’s missing brother is a major problem, and I’m determined to do what I can to help, but first, a problem closer to home needs handling. Adam.

description:
There comes a time in every young man’s life where he has a crisis of identity and purpose.

I just never expected mine to be so literal.

I suddenly found myself thrust into another world, summoned by a spell gone wrong. If that wasn’t weird enough, apparently the man who did the spell was my doppelganger and the star pupil in this crazy fantasy world’s most prestigious magic academy.

But why did we swap places? Why do we look so similar? And why can I suddenly control elements like I’m an extra in Avatar the Last Airbender?

If I’m going to make it back home, I’ll need to find the answers to these questions. All while faking my way through magic classes, fighting mage duels, and dodging suspicious teachers who are convinced my new friends and I are out to topple the evil regime ruling this world.

And maybe we are.

Why did I swap places with a man who could be my long-lost twin? Why can I suddenly do magic? And why does the government of this world hate the idea of cross-dimension travel to the point where they’ll kill anyone just for mentioning it?

My friends and I need to find these answers.

And we’re not going to let a little thing like house arrest stop us.

author: J.B. Garner

description:
With the opening of Crystalfire Keep, Max, Kayla, and the rest of the crew find themselves in a race
against time to gather a force strong enough to beat the timed raid dungeon in time to secure the big cash prize.

With rival guilds causing trouble within the game and a dangerous wager in the real world looming, what begins as a difficult trial turns into a near-impossible mission with consequences far out reaching a simple contest.

The futures of not only Max and Kayla, but that of their friends, family, and possibly the whole game are at stake. Worse, their only hope to save the day may just lie with the mysterious return of a lost legend.
title: Elements of Wrath Online 3: Crystalfire Keep
author: J.B. Garner

description:
Unlike real life, Max is pretty good at playing games, so when a new limited time dungeon opens up in the virtual reality game he plays boasting a huge cash prize, Max knows he needs to try and complete it if he wants to be able to pay rent this month.

Fortunately, the only guild strong enough to attempt to take it on before the timer runs out needs a tank.

There’s just one problem, he’s never played with them before, and even if he convinces the Sisters of Artemis to let him join in time to tank the dungeon and collect the prize money, if they wipe, it’s all over.

That would be bad because without that prize money, both he and his baby sister will be sleeping in a cardboard box under a bridge, and Max really hates sleeping in cardboard boxes. Been there, done that, sold the T-shirt.
title: Elements of Wrath Online: Ring of Promise
author: J.B. Garner

description:
OVERVIEW:

A supervillain from the city of Grayville has made a big mistake: he stole from one of my companies. Now he is on my radar, and it's only a matter of time before I find him, and of course, murder him.

Ironically, the only thing preventing me from bringing the unknown douchebag to final justice is Grayville’s famous law-abiding superhero: The Shadow Knight.

But even a hero as accomplished as the Shadow Knight can’t stop me and my team from ending the supervillain threat.

And if Shadow Knight won’t accept that, he might have to die as well.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Evil Genius 2: Becoming the Apex Supervillain
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

A horde of deadly super villains have escaped from Grayville’s maximum security super-prison, and it's up my team to hunt them down. 

And The Shadow Knight is helping out. 

Unfortunately, that means we can’t kill these villains when we catch them without shattering our tenuous alliance with the hero. 

But as always, I’m one step ahead, and I have some surprises in store for both Shadow Knight and the bad guys that will change the power dynamic in Grayville forever.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Evil Genius 3: Becoming the Apex Supervillain
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Yes, I killed all the supervillains housed in the Grayville ultramax prison. I’m sure some, like the Shadow Knight, would consider that to be crossing a line and an unforgivable act of an unrepentant mass murderer.
I consider it another high-performance day on the job.
If the Shadow Knight has a problem with it, he knows where to find me.
I really hope he does have a problem.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Evil Genius 4: Becoming the Apex Supervillain
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Now that I’ve killed Shadow Knight, all the villains of Grayville think that they can have their run of the city.
And they are all led by the Maniac.
But what these idiots don’t realize is that hunting villains is my favorite pastime, and now that the Shadow Knight is dead, it’s open season.
Time to bag some trophies. problem with it, he knows where to find me.
I really hope he does have a problem.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Evil Genius 5: Becoming the Apex Supervillain
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Ever since I started on my quest to rid the world of super villains I knew that my methods would bring me into conflict with people who profited from the status quo.
Such as Optimo, the most powerful superhero on Earth.

It tooks us months of practice and preparation, but now my team and I are nearly ready to strike him down. I can’t wait to see the sneer on his face turn to fear when Optimo realizes he is going to die and that I will be the one to kill him.
And once he is dead, I’ll remake the world in my image.

 Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Evil Genius 6: Becoming the Apex Supervillain
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Supervillains are murdering people in the streets, but yet superheroes are more concerned with gaining popularity than bringing the villains to justice.

These villains think they are above the law and that nobody can stop them, but they never planned for me. I’ll murder every one of them with my powersuit, traps, and sidekicks.

And if killing bad guys makes me a villain in the eyes of the heroes, well… I’ll destroy them too.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Evil Genius: Becoming the Apex Supervillain
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
This is a Marcus Sloss exclusive release and will only be available for a limited time.

The Accords were a lie, a peace designed to be a trap.

Carter Prichard wanted a steady revenue to start a home of his own in Tyris. A land where elves are numerous, forests contain diabolical danger, and humans are still the newer species.

While hunting deep in the untamed borderlands, he unearths a grave containing two artifacts of a forgotten apocalypse. One is a sword that hungers for magic, the other, a crossbow engineered to slay dragons.

Not long after, his discovery leads him to a terrifying truth while on a hunt. The elitist elves aren't abiding by the peace terms. No, not one bit. In fact, they’re enslaving humanity as livestock. After rescuing a woman, Carter draws a line in the mud that shatters the fragile peace of the kingdom and declares his own war.

With a militia of outcasts, a growing family, and weapons that terrify even the immortals, he stands against a tide of minotaurs, magic, and tyranny.

The elves thought they were culling the herd. They just woke up the wolf.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Extraordinary Hero: An Epic Fantasy
author: Marcus Sloss

description:
OVERVIEW:

You all know Brody from his Youtube channel where he reviews the latest and greatest menu items from the best restaurants in America, but all that is about to change.

After the storm of the century, “The guy with the golden tongue” will find himself a fish out of water in an idyllic fantasy world without much of a need for Youtubers. But if there is one thing that unites people no matter what world they come from, it’s the love of good food, and nobody is better at identifying good food than Brody.

Brody is going to have to start small: advising tavern proprietors on how to tweak their recipes for maximum wow factor. But once the people in Altrumnia realize that where Brody walks, culinary delight follows, no price will be too high to pay for his services.

Brody is in for the delicious journey of a lifetime, full of food, wine, women, and friendship.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Fantasy Food Critic
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

Things had been pretty boring since I inherited my parents’ farm. If you didn’t count the constant badgering of distant family members wanting the land, or the Tax Man wanting his cut.

Until, one day, my farm was struck by an earthquake. Which isn’t all that uncommon in California, but this quake somehow transported me and my entire farm to a fantasy world.

Now I need to figure out how to protect my property against things like goblins and balls of slime, and in the meantime, maybe I can help the nearby starving villagers with some of my crops.

Especially the pretty blonde elf living on the farm down the road.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Fantasy World Farm
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

My life got turned completely upside down when an earthquake somehow transported my California farm to a fantasy world.

But things aren’t all bad. In fact, they’re looking pretty great.

The town I’d landed near was on the brink of starvation, and the produce from my farm has been their saving grace. They’ve welcomed me with open arms, and I’ve started to put down roots, especially with the beautiful elf maiden Ellyn at my side.

I’ve also made friends with a cute human hunter, and I wouldn’t mind getting closer to her.

Even if that entails hunting down a legendary Fell Bear.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Fantasy World Farm 2
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

I’ve started to grow comfortable in the town of Gladewood. My farm was helping the previously malnourished population grow stronger, and even a wyvern attack couldn’t put a damper on our spirits.

But then a messenger ran into Gladewood begging for help. Bandits had laid siege to a nearby town, and without our assistance, the messenger was afraid Midhallow would be razed to the ground.

I might have only been a farmer back on Earth, but living in Mystica has started to turn me into a warrior, too, and I can’t let these bandits pose a potential threat to my new home.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Fantasy World Farm 3
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

I defeated the bandit threat that was causing problems in the neighboring town of Midhallow, but the final battle unearthed a new batch of problems.

Namely that magic is somehow returning to Mystica.

Now, a mysterious, enchanted shard has taken up residence in the forest outside Gladewood. And it’s causing things to go haywire.

Animals are acting strangely, townsfolk are waking up with powers that have been long dormant in their people, and even my crops are starting to look weird.

I’m not about to let my farm be wiped out by some magic crystal, so it’s up to me to figure out a solution.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Fantasy World Farm 4
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

I thought disarming the magical shard that had taken up residence near Gladewood would solve all our problems.

But I was wrong.

The shard seems to be sentient, or maybe it’s being controlled by an outside force.

Either way, it’s still wreaking havoc on my new home. We’ve sent a messenger to some wizards who might be able to help, but I’m not holding my breath.

All I know is that I’ll do whatever it takes to protect my farm and the people I care about.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Fantasy World Farm 5
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

After my parents were murdered, I thought the most difficult things in my near future were to find their killer and take over my father’s gang.
Well, I found the killer, but then the FBI had to get in the way.
While running from the feds, I ended up falling through this portal and into another world with crazy creatures, monster-people, and magic.
But there are things I’m familiar with. Like corruption. Like organized crime. Like beautiful women.
And I think I could do pretty well for myself in this new world.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Fantasy World Mob Boss
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Things have definitely been looking up since I escaped from an FBI raid and fell through a portal into another world. I’ve even managed to start my own little gang with a few trusted people. Two of which are beautiful women.

But there are dark parts of this new world. Like the witches who run the city, the merfolk that do their dirty work, and the phoe people that get slaughtered just for existing.

Well, maybe it’s time someone upset the status quo.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Fantasy World Mob Boss 2
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

My gang of otherworldly friends and I have struck a blow against the evil witch overlords who rule over Pyregate. We’ve spilled their blood, broken into their Ministry, and helped my lover Chantara awaken her powers that the witches have long suppressed.
But the war is just beginning.

If we’re really going to take on the witches, we’ll need a bigger army. An army full of ogres and vixens.

And phoenixes.

There’s a colony of phoenixes on the mainland that are rumored to live relatively undisturbed by the witches. And if I can win them over to our cause, and awaken their powers, the witches won’t stand a chance when we march against them and finally take back Pyregate.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Fantasy World Mob Boss 3
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

My gang and I have accomplished a lot since I fell through a portal into this world. We’ve freed some phoenixes from slavery, recruited more fighters to our cause, and we even destroyed the Ministry and took out all the witches on the island of Pyregate.

But our victory is not yet complete. There are still witches on the mainland, and their allies, the elves, are not taking the regime change lightly.

If I’m going to hold on to my new territory, I will need to grow my army.

And then strike when my enemies least suspect it.

te.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Fantasy World Mob Boss 4
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
Power. The ambitious thirst for it.

But when a power-hungry wizard lord seeks to expand his rule, he triggers events unforeseen. The balance of magic is altered, races of old return, and beasts of legend stalk the land.

Unlikely heroes armed with magical objects are drawn into the conflict:

  • Jerrell "Jace" - A snarky, clever thief whose outrageous exploits force him to hide his identity.
  • Narine - A daring wizardess caught between her mad wizard lord father and jealous brother.
  • Rhoa - A determined acrobat, armed with enchanted blades and a thirst for revenge.
  • Rawk - Exiled for urges he cannot control; this dwarf possesses unique magic abilities.
  • Brogan - A disgraced warrior who labors beneath the weight of his regrets.


These characters lead a compelling and memorable cast including ruthless wizards who vie for thrones able to grant the power of a god. How do you defeat a god?

Fate of Wizardoms is a fast-paced fantasy saga filled with compelling characters and beloved genre tropes, perfect for fans of The Lord of the Rings, The Witcher, or Wheel of Time.
title: Fate of Wizardoms: Books 1-3 Box Set
author: Jeffrey L Kohanek

description:
Power. The ambitious thirst for it.

But when a power-hungry wizard lord seeks to expand his rule, he triggers events unforeseen. The balance of magic is altered, races of old return, and beasts of legend stalk the land.

Unlikely heroes armed with magical objects are drawn into the conflict:

  • Jerrell "Jace" - A snarky, clever thief whose outrageous exploits force him to hide his identity.
  • Narine - A daring wizardess caught between her mad wizard lord father and jealous brother.
  • Rhoa - A determined acrobat, armed with enchanted blades and a thirst for revenge.
  • Rawk - Exiled for urges he cannot control; this dwarf possesses unique magic abilities.
  • Brogan - A disgraced warrior who labors beneath the weight of his regrets.


These characters lead a compelling and memorable cast including ruthless wizards who vie for thrones able to grant the power of a god. How do you defeat a god?

Fate of Wizardoms is a fast-paced fantasy saga filled with compelling characters and beloved genre tropes, perfect for fans of The Lord of the Rings, The Witcher, or Wheel of Time.
title: Fate of Wizardoms: Books 4-6 Box Set
author: Jeffrey L Kohanek

description:
OVERVIEW:

Blood runs thicker than water, but it still runs.
When Inspector Glenn Finlay responds to the scene of the murder of a wealthy patriarch, he quickly realizes that what looked like a palatial estate was in fact a den of vipers. Everyone is a suspect, everyone has a motive, and only Scotland’s best detective can crack the case before the killer covers their tracks… or strikes again.
title: Finlay Files - A Family Affair
author: Duncan Wallace

description:
OVERVIEW:

Miles Alcott has always felt a bit like a fish out of water his whole life: he never made the Olympics as a gymnast, his parkour career wasn’t really taking off, and he didn’t have a tightly knit group of family and friends he could rely on through thick and thin.

Things seemed to get worse when he was transported to Thornwallace, a fantastical city from another place and time where life seems permanently frozen in a harsh early industrial era, crime and poverty run rampant, and magic lies hidden beneath the surface. The humans, elves, dwarves, and even more exotic creatures live hardscrabble lives and try to eek out survival in an unforgiving city.

Nothing in Miles’ life in America prepared him to last long in this place, but when he falls in with a guild of thieves, pickpockets, con artists, safe-crackers, and masters of disguise, he finds out that his athletic skills are perfectly suited to being the greatest cat burglar Thornwallace has ever seen.

With the money, power, and women he’ll get from being a master thief, Miles will find what he’s always been searching for: a family who have each others’ backs no matter how hard the obstacles they face become.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Friends in Low Places
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Gabriel would be the most powerful mage in the universe... if he were in the right universe. That's why the goddess of luck has sent him into a fantasy world to help the last of her followers.

Now, he will use his power to manipulate minds and magic to help an orcish shield knight, a cunning dragoness archer, and an elven healer create the most powerful guild of adventurers this world had ever seen.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: God of Magic
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Gabriel has taken his first step to becoming the most powerful mage in the universe, but the path to his ultimate destiny has just begun. The next step to greatness for both he and his ragtag guild lay in their latest contract to recover a powerful magical artifact from across the desert.

Now, he will have to harness new powers over the mind and magic to overcome dragons, gryphons, a fight club full of halflings, and the harebrained ideas of a sweet-but-ditzy alchemist just to reach their goal and the powerful rogue wizard who has it in his clutches.

This novel contains harem elements.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: God of Magic 2
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Under Gabriel's leadership and with the help of his unique powers of magical manipulation, the Shadow Foxes were growing to be a powerful and well-regarded guild. So much so that the great mages' school that runs every aspect of life in his new home calls upon them with a new contract, the most dangerous kind.

An escort quest.

Now, Gabriel's powers will be put to the test as his guild has to shepherd a beautiful young cat-girl mage through rampaging marauders, a rather tasteful magical ogre, some rather tasteless orc pirates, flesh-eating pixies, and a looming threat that holds the secret of a forbidden magic.

This novel contains harem elements.

Narration by: Daniel Wisniewski, Rebecca Woods
Length: 7 Hours, 22 Minutes

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: God of Magic 3
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

When the thief guilds all join forces to steal the treasure of the city, Gabriel and the Shadow Foxes face their toughest challenge yet.

But throw in a powerful gorgon, the prying mage academy, and a berserker vigilante hafling, and… well… Let’s just say that Gabriel’s unique brand of controlling magic is going to be the only thing that can save the day.

If he can just survive the day.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: God of Magic 4
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The Shadow Foxes latest bounty mission from the Mage’s Academy is to find mysterious objects of power from the past.

Normally, this would be no problem for Gabriel, the most powerful mage in the world, and his famous guild of lovable misfits, but there are sinister forces racing against them with the same goal.

These objects are dangerous under any circumstances, but if any of the magical objects fall into the wrong hands, the results would be cataclysmic.

And the wrong hands always seem to be one step ahead.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: God of Magic 5
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Having uncovered a conspiracy within the Mage’s Guild to use the all-powerful Shodra magic items to conquer the world, Gabriel and the Shadow Foxes have no choice but to break into the Mage’s Tower and get them away from the forces of darkness.

Easier said than done, especially when one of Gabriel's lovers is pregnant with his child, but nothing is impossible for Gabe as he continues to master his arcane abilities and become the God of Magic.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: God of Magic 6
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Gabriel and The Shadow Foxes are running for their lives from the forces of Archmage Maderel.

With time running out and an epic confrontation looming, Gabe will have to master his magical abilities and finally fulfill his promise of becoming the God of Magic in order to save the world.

This is the final novel in the God of Magic series.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: God of Magic 7
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

I was supposed to be on a bus to Miami Beach to start my new life after my hermit father passed away, but everything goes sideways when the bus randomly ends up in the middle of a lush forest.

The handful of passengers and I try to figure out what’s going on, and now we’re faced with surviving in the wilderness among a trio of beautiful dryads.

But things take a dark turn when horrific, caustic, sludge monsters attack the grove. Survival here isn’t going to be as easy as I thought.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Guardian of the Dryads
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

We escaped from New York City, but the mages are still hot on our heels. We’re heading west, to see a man about a gun.

Actually, a lot of guns.

Any gun I touch I can summon back, so I need to grow my arsenal to have a chance to fend off our pursuers and make it to the west coast. Unfortunately, we’ll have to traverse miles mutant-infested wilderness to get to our contact, and even if we make it through the mutant lands, the mages could easily be waiting for us on the other side.

I’m definitely gonna need a lot of guns.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Gun Mage 2: Surviving a Post Apocalyptic Magic Earth
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The arsenal of guns that I can summon has grown along with the number of my allies, and we have managed to outrun the pursuing mages for the time being.

Unfortunately, to get away from them we had to go places they won’t: mutant infested wilderness, forgotten towns filled with strange religious cults, and even more dangerous locales.

So we still have plenty of problems, but as I’m learning, there aren’t many problems that can survive a bullet to the head.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Gun Mage 3: Surviving a Post Apocalyptic Magic Earth
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

On January 1st, 2020, the comet hit, and a good chunk of the people on Earth died or turned into mutants. But some people gained powerful magical abilities.

You would think that the fall of humankind would usher in a time of peace and happiness for the survivors, but since powerful people tend to be assholes, life got worse, and these mages enslaved those who couldn’t protect themselves.

I have magic too, but not just any magic. I can summon guns, and nothing kills asshole mages better than a bullet through the brain.

Disclaimer: this is a slow-burn harem series with explicit sex scenes.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Gun Mage: Surviving a Post Apocalyptic Magic Earth
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

As a former sergeant in the Army, I’d like to think I’m very practical and level headed. But after I moved back to Louisiana and reconnected with my best friend and his wife, they somehow convinced me to join them in their new hobby:

Ghost hunting.

At first, I thought we would just have a little fun on the weekends, and I’d get to spend more time with my friends and the cute girls in the group, but then I witnessed things that have no logical explanation.

People appearing and disappearing in the blink of an eye. Objects moving around in the old beach house I’m renting. Even people being harmed by invisible forces.

Maybe paranormal investigations aren’t as fake as I thought they were…

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
seriesName: How to Hunt Ghosts and Get Girls
title: How to Hunt Ghosts and Get Girls
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

When I returned to Louisiana after leaving the Army, I thought my life was going to be peaceful, if a little boring.

Boy was I wrong.

Now, I’ve witnessed irrefutable proof that ghosts are real. And also profitable. So, in between my daily job as a handyman, my friends and I are making our own paranormal investigation group, to better help our community and also make a little money on the side.

And we have our first client. A cop who wants to keep this investigation on the down low so he doesn’t face any repercussions from his department.

But after seeing what he’s dealing with at home, a write-up at work is the last thing this guy needs to be worrying about…

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
seriesName: How to Hunt Ghosts and Get Girls
title: How to Hunt Ghosts and Get Girls 2
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Things have been looking up for SARGE, the paranormal investigation group my friends and I started together. We’ve been paid for several jobs already, and we’re starting to get noticed.

Especially by a pretty influencer who wants to do a collaboration with us.

A few months ago, if you told me that I would be hiking into the bayou to hunt for some kind of werewolf cryptid, I would have laughed in your face.

But… stranger things have happened, and even if we don’t find the Rougarou, at least we’ll get some content we can try to monetize.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
seriesName: How to Hunt Ghosts and Get Girls
title: How to Hunt Ghosts and Get Girls 3
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

SARGE, my team of paranormal investigators, is on the brink of making a name for ourselves. We’ve slowly started to gain traction in the community, and a substantial amount of followers on our Youtube channel, but this next job offer might put us over the top.

And take us international.

Of course, there’s still a lot to do back home in Louisiana. One of my girlfriends and I are trying to buy a house, and there are some local hauntings that we’ve put on our to-do list.

But my sights are set on Ireland, and the actual bonafide castle we’ve been asked to investigate.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
seriesName: How to Hunt Ghosts and Get Girls
title: How to Hunt Ghosts and Get Girls 4
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

When Edinburgh is rocked by a murder so violent and gruesome that it appears to be the work of gang of perpetrators, DCI Logan Thorne is called in to begin the hunt.

But what if the killer is operating alone? Does one man have the titanic strength needed to kill two others at the same with only his bare hands?

What if Logan isn’t trying to catch a man at all?

What if a monster roams the streets of Edinburgh at night?
title: Hunting a Monster: A Logan Thorne DCI Scottish Detective Thriller
author: Duncan Wallace

description:
All I wanted on my day off was to get some new ink and see the pretty tattoo artist who had been flirting with me during my last few sessions.

I definitely didn’t expect to get teleported to an fantasy world filled with berserker zombies, fairies, and shapeshifters that lived in futuristic cities while oppressing the other races.

I also didn’t expect my tattoos to come to life. And since most of them are weapons, it seems I am uniquely suited to fight.

This world has already had an apocalypse, but maybe it’s time to start a revolution.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Ink Warrior
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
The magical world of Nordisfell is a strange and dangerous place, but the people who populate Evaentir make every bit of danger worth it, especially my hot new fairy girlfriend, Melody.

But there are threats in this world like I’ve never known before.

Then an orcish army arrives at the newly-built gates of our small city, and we have to figure out whether it’s in our best interest to help them in their quest or leave them to fend for themselves.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Ink Warrior 2
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Things have only gotten crazier since I activated my magic.

Not only did I turn into a white tiger shifter, instead of a charmer like the rest of my family, but I’m also apparently part of some prophecy.

I am supposed to be the bringer of light in a time of darkness.

And as asteroids begin falling and our school falls under more attacks, I can tell whatever darkness I’m supposed to fight is getting stronger.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Kane's Fate 2: Weretiger Legend of Meloria Academy
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Life as the prophesied white tiger shifter is never boring.

I’m constantly either fending off women, defending my school, or researching the Atroba, the evil terrorist cult hellbent on destroying the magical world as we know it.

Not to mention traveling all over the world to find more answers to this prophecy I’m a part of.

But with my friends and girlfriends at my side, we’ll save the magical populace from any and every threat.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Kane's Fate 3: Weretiger Legend of Meloria Academy
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The stakes are ratcheting up now that we know Premier Weaver is somehow in league with the Atroba, the evil cult trying to destroy the magical world as we know it.

But in order to stop the Premier, we need irrefutable proof that she is working for the Atroba, and to get that proof, we’ll need to break into her mansion all the way in Louisiana.

To get there, we’ll need some fast, reliable transportation, so I’ll need some cash.

And luckily, my friend Auden knows just who to ask

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Kane's Fate 4: Weretiger Legend of Meloria Academy
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The Atroba are public enemy number one after they practically took the Premier hostage, and it’s up to me to hunt them down.

Unfortunately, the bastards are good at hiding, so my women and I have to travel to New York City and even all the way to Norway for leads.

But one thing is for certain: I won’t rest until the leader of the Atroba, Philo Geralds, is dead at my feet.

That purpose arrives twofold as she selects new crewmembers for the Seachange and learns of an expedition to an alien world on the periphery of known space, where traces of her ancient Creators have been found. But new and unexpected enemies dog the starlanes now, including the fabled Mystic Pirates.

Maauro in seeking a wider meaning to her existence, wants to create a new “network” of biologicals around her. Her recruiting focuses on a refugee camp where among others she selects a young boy who has withdrawn from war-torn reality into the fantasy that he is a robot. Seeing a mirror of her own questions about existence, she takes him under her wing. But can she help him answer questions that she, herself, has not resolved?

The second book of the Seachange series begins a new adventure and a unique peril for Maauro.

As Maauro continues her voyages, seeking meaning and purpose, she shapes course for Enshar, seeking knowledge of the fate of her ancient creators. There she must dare the sunken city of Barjan, where Robert Fenaday and Shasti Rainhell once fought a nightmare from the ancient past. But was it the only terrible force buried there?

Unhappily left behind, Dassa and the crew fall victim to a conspiracy and must outwit a clever adversary or lose the ship and any hope for Rasfel.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Maauro Seachanges Book 3 | In The Deep
author: Edward F McKeown

description:
OVERVIEW:

Maauro has survived the terrors of the Barjan Deep. Armed with new information on her Creators, she sets out. Disaster strikes the hyperspace channel. Seachange is thrown into uncharted space. But they have not exited alone. A Thieves Guild ship, pursued by the Ederi, has also been flung free. Seachange must find somewhere to land but the unknown planet ahead, is circled by huge alien vessels. What awaits when they slip through the blockade to find the strange world which they have chanced upon?

Maauro continues to recover from Wrik’s passing and to deepen her relationship with Dassa. This is complicated by new arrivals, the ancient drone, Draguar, rescued on Enshar and the human, Ash, who Dassa reluctantly recruited to keep Seachange from being impounded. Factions are beginning to form on Seachange as different agendas, hopes and dreams clash.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Maauro Seachanges Book 4 | Journey Interrupted
author: Edward F McKeown

description:
OVERVIEW:

The galaxy comes apart as Maauro begins her journey home. Maauro has sailed the stars, battled aliens, pirates, and the Thieves Guild. Through her friendship with Dassa and her crew, she has reacquired the joy in life that she lost when Wrik passed.

Now she is ready for the challenge of finding the descendants of Wrik’s family. But there is a mysterious force stalking Maauro and Dassa. One they have fled before.

Can it have followed them all the way back to Retief?


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Maauro Seachanges Book 5 | Resolutions
author: Edward F McKeown

description:
OVERVIEW:

Once I was a mortal man living on Earth, but now I’m the Tempest Demon known as Atticus, and I have served the Dark King for eons as he wages endless war across the realms. Until today, when I finally ripped myself free from the Dark King’s shackles.

The demons want me back. The heavens want me destroyed.

Each side will send their minions after me, but the men I will crush and the women I will tame with my demon-seed before I add them to my harem.

I was born on Earth and made in hell, but now I am free to rule all worlds.
title: Made in Hell
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Running my own illegal mining operation has made me richer than I ever imagined I’d be. Now, my deadly women get anything they need, I take everything I want, and anyone who has a problem with this becomes my prey.

Even if they’re the top crime syndicates in the Shadow Quarters. Or even the top priest of the Church.

All who cross me will be punished, and now that I’ve gained even more hellish power, those punishments have only become more torturous.
title: Made in Hell 2
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
Overview

No one obstructs my business and lives to tell the tale. Not even the incubi who rule the Shadow Quarters.

Unfortunately, their elusive minions could be stalking my every movement through any alleyway, the Church is on the hunt for the priest’s murderer, and the Lord Captains of the Hellscape are trying new tactics.

But none of this is enough to stop me. I will destroy every last incubus in this city. Right after I’ve forced their horde of minions to serve me instead.
title: Made in Hell 3
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
Overview

I once sought to leave the Port of Rengfri as quickly as possible, but now nothing will drive me from this city. This is my home, and my murderous women and I will claim every inch of this island instead.

To do that, I need to build an unstoppable army, unleash a mass slaughter on the Blessed, and conquer the Church once and for all. But so much reward comes with even more risks.
title: Made in Hell 4
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
Overview

With the Church finally wiped out of this city, the Port of Rengfri is entirely at my disposal. I’m free to run my businesses as I please, unleash my minions on all of my enemies, and even take any home I like for my own.

Including castles.

But there’s a stubborn and annoyingly beautiful angel trailing me who’s determined to have the last word.

It’s hard to care much about her, though, when I’ve got a sweet and innocent elf grabbing all of my attention.
title: Made in Hell 5
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
Overview

There’s more evil at work in this kingdom than I expected. Undesirables all over the islands of Selythia are still being stolen and tortured, but I’m a professional punisher from the festering voids of the Hellscape.

This is kind of my area of expertise, and I’m more than willing to address the issue personally.

Even if it’s the king himself who needs punishing.

But when a certain angel takes a perilous fall from the Heavenly Glade, it starts to look like we’ve got even bigger problems.

And the arrival of my Lord Captain is just the moldy icing on top of this very bloody cake.
title: Made in Hell 6
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
Overview

My reign as the Demon King of Selythia has begun, but it turns out slaughtering my way to the top is just a step too far for my immortal enemies.

Now, both the Heavenly Glade and the Hellscape are chomping at the bit to finally end my crusade on the surface world.

So let them come.

My sinful women, deathly minions, and ever-growing collection of hell powers are more than enough to take down the immortal kings and their armies.

It’s time for this rogue demon to claim every realm for his own.
title: Made in Hell 7
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

To kill a common man, use a blade.
To kill a soldier, use a bow.
To kill a mage, use stronger magic.
To kill a fallen god? Well… I better figure out what to use soon.

I’m a murderer, a hired killer, an assassin with unheard of magic. I never asked to be a hero, but if I don’t stop this titan from destroying the kingdom, he will kill me, my family of assassins, and the two beautiful women that I love.

So it is a hero I will become.
title: Mage Assassin
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Being the Master Assassin of my estate means the risks are greater, and the rewards are more than plenty. With monarchs, headmistresses, and all of Ocadia relying on me to settle the scores, it’s time to play my hand in a higher-stakes game.

But even all of this seems to pale in comparison to taking on the water goddesses themselves to free the siren I love.

And to succeed, I’ll need to gain a power no mortal ever has.
title: Mage Assassin 2
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

A fleet of foreign assassins are on the loose in Ocadia, and their target is none other than the king himself. It looks like tensions between enemy kingdoms have peaked, but in my line of work, things are always more than they appear.
It’s up to me to find out who’s really behind this deadly scheme, but their elusive powers seem to give them the upper hand at every turn.
Luckily, my own powers are evolving in unexpected ways, and the sexiest witch I know is eager to assist.
title: Mage Assassin 3
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The Goddess of the Prevailing Winds is lurking around Ocadia, and she’s not too happy with me.

It turns out thwarting her assassination plans has bigger fallout than I anticipated, and my women and I are now her primary targets.

But my schedule is already packed with nosy fire gods, creepy necromancers, and ancient sorcerers.

And there’s a certain sweet-faced duchess who seems very eager for a private audience with me…
title: Mage Assassin 4
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Once again, it appears I’m the only thing standing between a stubborn, vengeful celestial and my entire kingdom.

But this time, it’s personal… and a little difficult to focus.

Mihany is as beautiful as she is determined. She’s also dead set on throwing a tantrum like Ocadia has never seen, but I refuse to bend to her will.

And with the dragon bone staff in my possession, I might just have a chance at subduing her at last.

As long as I’m prepared to make the ultimate sacrifice.
title: Mage Assassin 5
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Strange forces are at work in this city.

Something, or someone, has finally managed to throw everything off balance, and there’s only one Master Assassin the king can trust to get to the bottom of things.

No matter how ancient, powerful, or absolutely vicious those things get.

Ocadia has always been the most magical place I could imagine, though, so it’s no surprise there’s even more secrets to uncover about this vast kingdom.

But for the first time in my life, my own secrets are being pulled from the shadows.

And as my new powers grow, I’m learning how very, very singular a mirror mage like me is.
title: Mage Assassin 6
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

I never expected to inherit a mysterious, haunted-looking inn.
So I definitely never imagined that inn would lead me into a whole multiverse called the Grymm.

Now, I carry the ancient keys to all sorts of different realms, and it turns out, there’s an endless amount of money to be made in inter-world trade.

No one ever said navigating a magical multiverse would be easy, though. The Grymm is a deadly place, where gorgeous women are bound to lives of servitude and salesmanship, and nothing is ever as innocent as it seems.

But having a highly coveted Venturer’s badge on my chest sure seems to be my ticket to riches, glory, and exotic women with magic powers beyond my wildest dreams.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Magic Girls of Multiverse inn
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

I’d never expected that Professor Wersnop was still alive out there somewhere, but he is, and it’s up to us to rescue him.

The mysterious third-floor room might be useful, and now we’ve finally figured out how to access it. But that’s just the start of our latest adventure.

Now it’s time to travel to a war-torn realm, find a powerful rebel leader, and save the professor who was responsible for all the best things in my life. I just hope we make it in time.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Magic Girls of Multiverse Inn 10
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

Anything could happen when you own a magical inn with private access to an endless multiverse, but I never saw this one coming.

Behind the next mysterious door lies a peculiar realm with incredible opportunities for a venturer like me.

And it turns out there’s millions of dollars to be made here.

But with so much fascination around every corner comes a strange sort of deceit that could cost me-- and this entire realm— everything.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Magic Girls of Multiverse Inn 2
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

Fixing up my old, haunted-looking inn has become a whole new journey, but even while I’m trying to keep workers from disappearing through magical doors, my women and I are still finding time to adventure into the wild realms of the Grymm.

Some much wilder and cutthroat than others.

But I’m beginning to realize that some deadly feats are worth their weight in more than just gold.

Especially when they involve avenging gorgeous, bloodthirsty damsels.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon

description:
OVERVIEW:

My magical inn is so close to ready for its grand reopening.

But while this small, quaint, Oregon town is wrapped up in their Halloween shenanigans, it looks like I’ve got some peace and quiet around the place for now.

Well… until I waltz into a strange new realm and accidentally end up in a life-or-death challenge of strength, wits, and endurance.

But hey, I’ve done some crazy things before for the promise of truly fantastic winnings. This time, my women and I just need to figure out how to survive long enough to claim our bounty.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon

author: Eric Vall

description:

We chose a great realm for finding wild and magical things to decorate the Multiverse Inn with, but it so happens this realm is also plagued by something horrible and destructive.

Now everything I know could be at risk, and it’s up to my women and me to save the day.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Magic Girls of Multiverse Inn 5
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

The open house is behind us, and my wild, magical inn is ready for our first guests. Donald Green and his family are in for one wild stay.

Having guests in the Multiverse Inn won’t stop my ladies and me from exploring new realms.

But when we stumble into an icy realm populated by people in some kind of weird, hypnotic daze, it’s no surprise that my ladies decide we need to step in and help, however we can.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon

author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

The Multiverse Inn is officially open for business! Things are going swimmingly, and now that we’ve got a full staff on the payroll, my ladies and I are ready for our next adventure through the Grymm.

We never would have expected to walk out into a desert town plagued by train-robbing bandits.

We’ve got a whole new adventure on our hands, thankfully, Astrea is here to show us the ropes, literally. But can we stop the bandits before they bleed the town dry?

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Magic Girls of Multiverse Inn 7
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

It’s Christmas, and that means a Christmas Eve ghost hunt for the guests of the Multiverse Inn, and then it means a new adventure through a new door for my ladies and me.

The tropical island we find is a welcome reprieve from the icy cold of Oregon, but things turn south quickly when the Chief and Chiefess reveal their plan to appease their gods. Human sacrifice.

There’s no way we can stand idly by while an innocent life is taken, but our plan needs to be flawless.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Magic Girls of Multiverse Inn 8
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

It’s time to explore the final door on the fourth floor of the Multiverse Inn, and the city is as interesting as any of the other realms we’ve traveled to.

Glittervale is a trove of raw materials, unique inventions, and interesting people, and one man we meet has some thrilling theories about the Grymm, the Boundless, and how they’re all connected.

But then a mysterious woman starts tailing us, and everything changes when she speaks one, familiar name: Arthur Wersnop.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Magic Girls of Multiverse Inn 9
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

They call me mad, but I don’t see anything wrong with using science to create the perfect monster girl.

They call me insane, but I just want to live my life with a harem of beautiful cat-girls, bear-girls, fox-girls, snake-girls, and… well, pretty much any type of monster girl.

They call me a megalomaniac, but why wouldn’t any red blooded man want to make cute babies with all these beautiful monster girls? They call me evil, but they just don’t realize that I’d destroy anyone who tries to harm my monster girls.

Looking for the ebook? Find it on Amazon
title: Making Monster Girls
author: Eric Vall

King Charles Rayburn and his monster girl army have the Queen surrounded and cornered in her capital city. But a cornered animal is the most dangerous, and she’ll use all the resources at her disposal to crush Charles and prevent him from taking the crown.
Unfortunately for Queen Calistia, no amount of magic, technology, or military tricks can prevent Charles from rising up, taking what’s his, and fulfilling his ultimate destiny!

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon

description:

My greatest experiment, the culmination of years’ of efforts, has been a success: I have created the world’s first monster girl.
Okay, so it was by accident, but what should have been the happy ending is merely the beginning. The forces of the matriarchy would stop at nothing to kill us all if they found out what I’ve done. Thus, there is only one logical solution: I must topple the matriarchy.
To do that, I’m going to need more monster girls.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon

author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

I was already a target, but now that I’ve created a harem of fiercely loyal and beautiful monster girls? The matriarchy won’t rest until I’m destroyed.

But me and wonderful monster girls won’t go down without a fight, and we will topple their disgusting system.

author: Eric Vall

OVERVIEW:

I am so close to triumph I can taste it, and everything is within my grasp.
A bevy of scientifically engineered monster girls.
The destruction of the Matriarchy.
Wealth and power beyond reckoning.
I just need to make The Duchess mine.
For science!

author: Eric Vall

description:
audiobook fulfillment provided by BookFunnel

OVERVIEW:

The duchess has believed my con, and now she is almost mine.
As soon as I make her my monster girl, my coup of this city will begin.
Then I will make every aristocrat my monster girl and rule this place.

description:
OVERVIEW:

Everything is unfolding exactly as I have planned it: I have created an entire legion of monster girls, conquered our duchy, and freed the enslaved men.
Now all that remains is to defeat the queen, create more monster girls, and liberate the entire realm.
It won’t be easy, though, since the queen has sent her most powerful generals and armies to garrison the towns on our route to the royal capital, and we’ll have to fight our way through the opposition.
But why kill the generals and their armies when I could capture and turn them into monster girls that love me, too?

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Making Monster Girls 6
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

I am the world’s greatest scientist, but being a conquering general is admittedly a new role for me. That said, I’m finding myself rather good at that, too.

The Queen and her lackeys feel safe with their large armies tucked behind mighty city walls, but soon-- oh, so soon!-- they will find out that science, with the help of hundreds of beautiful monster girls, can topple even the strongest walls.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Making Monster Girls 7
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

As my armies have grown, so have the challenges we’ve faced, and I’ve managed to overcome all of them.

But now we take on one of the Queen’s most heavily fortified cities, but this time we cannot afford to spend weeks laying siege to it. I’ll have to engineer new weapons to break through the defenses, and recruit new allies to take on the hordes of enemies if we are going to continue our advance toward the capital and knock the Queen off her throne.

Luckily, I am the world’s greatest scientist, and it will all be child’s play. Down with the Matriarchy!

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Making Monster Girls 8
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

Charles, along with his army and his monster girls, are closing in on the capital city where the final confrontation with Queen Calistia and the Matriarchy awaits.
But before they can launch their assault, they have to rescue Josephine’s mother from the clutches of the Queen.
They believed that Josephine was in a medical prison being treated for a disease, but the horror that they’ll discover there is far beyond anything they thought was possible.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Making Monster Girls 9
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

Every dragon lives in a mountain lair filled with fantastical creatures he dominates, a gilded hoard of riches, a harem of wives he collects, and surrounding territory that he terrifies into submission.

Sadly, our dragon has died! Who will lead our mountain? Who will grow the hoard? Who will protect the harem?

Our wizards had a plan: using an ancient ritual to summon a young dragon to roost in our mountain and keep the delicate ecosystem functional. But we didn’t account for what happened when the ritual was completed.

A human-- a human!-- from some place called “Earth” arrived and he knows nothing of domination. He knows nothing about collecting gold. He knows nothing about managing a harem of wives.

Will this puny human rise to the occasion and become the master we need to bring us stability and comfort? Or will the mountain collapse into anarchy and misery?

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Master of Dragon Mountain
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

This magical world is about to have an industrial revolution.

1 - Get pulled from a life of 20th century boredom and thrust into a fantasy world.
2 - Find out there are a bunch of powerful monsters and evil wizards intent on killing everyone.
3 - Use new magical powers of earth and metal to craft awesome armor, swords, and GUNS.
4 - Kill the bad guys, become a hero, and have a harem of hot women.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Metal Mage
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

As always, Mason has his hands full protecting several kingdoms, but at least he’s finally getting some reward for all his hard work.

Now that he’s a baron, Mason has to figure out what to do with all his new land, his new riches, and his new mansion.

But life is not all rich baron sex and giant statues made of precious gemstones.

The Master’s fortress looms in the eastern foothills, and his possessed mages aren’t the only things roaming Illaria’s countryside now.

So, it’s a good thing Mason has his own personal battle dragon and a fleet of deadly metal automatons at his disposal.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Metal Mage 10
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

Life as a baron is great.
Well, mostly great.
Mason could probably do with fewer murderous monsters, like acid-spitting spiders and giant fire titans, but he makes due. His village is well defended, his metallic creations get more epic by the day, and his women are relatively safe and healthy, so Mason spends some well-deserved time getting to know Baroness Batonova a little better.

But war is coming to Illaria, whether they want it to or not.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Metal Mage 11
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

Mason’s plate is pretty damn full.
The war with the Master is ramping up, but Mason and Aurora have been made Heads of the Order of Elementa, their troops are being dispatched to every corner of the realm, Mason has made a metal dragon that kicks ass, breathes fire, and flies, and, oh yeah, all his women are raring to give him bad ass heirs.
But when his tour across the land ends up conflicting with the Master’s plans, Mason finally stumbles upon the secret to defeating his nemesis.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Metal Mage 12
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

The war has officially begun, and it’s time for Mason to make his first offensive strike.

But first he’s gotta round up his allies, overcome centuries of racial prejudices, and make sure the elves, ogres, dwarves, and mages don’t kill each other before it’s time to move out.

Good thing he’s got his deadly, terrifying women to keep things in check.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Metal Mage 13
author: Eric Vall

Mason has dealt his first major blow to the Master’s forces.
Now, it’s time to siege his fortress and take out his army of minions once and for all.
But the war is not all Mason has to deal with.
His women have some special news for him, and Nulena has a secret that will rock Mason to his very core.

The end is finally here.
The Master, the elven Elite of Nalnora, and the bastard head of House Orrel are all that stand between Mason Flynt and a life of rich and kinky retirement.
So, it’s time for the ultimate Flynt Family Massacre.

author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

If you thought having magic and guns were cool while everyone else has swords, imagine having robots.
5 - Build a battle robot.
6 - Kill the bandits terrorizing the land.
7 - Find out just how grateful the princess really is.

title: Metal Mage 2
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

As Mason strengthens his magic over metal and stone, the Master lurks in the shadows.
To lure the Master out and stop his nefarious plot, Mason and his harem of mages and princesses have to do several things:
1) Take over the Order of Mages
2) Build a train and railroad system to connect the kingdoms of Illaria and Cedis
3) Keep from getting burned by giant, murderous creatures made of flame

Sounds like a piece of cake, right?

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Metal Mage 3
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

All aboard!

With the railroad up and running, Mason Flynt and his band of mages turn their attention to the dwarven kingdom of Orebane that lies in the frigid northern Draconis Mountains.

But treacherous terrain is not all they’re up against.

In order to get the dwarves to agree to their new trade agreement, Mason will have to prove his mettle against deadly cave dragons, towering ice giants, and the Master pulling the strings behind the scene.

The temperatures might be dropping, but the heat is on.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Metal Mage 4

After defeating the Ice Giants of the North and saving the dwarves, Mason faces his toughest challenge yet: politics.

Mason and his band of badass warrior women travel to Nalnora, the kingdom of the elves, in order to learn more about the Master and his runic powers.

However, the elves are not as forthcoming as the other kingdoms. To win them over, Mason must curry favor with the great Elven Houses through various means: weapon building, assassination, and cultivating life saving medicine.

Oh, and he has to be careful not to be eaten by the Nalnoran landscape.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Metal Mage 5
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

Mason now has proof the Master is working in Nalnora, but he’s quickly learned that getting elves to cooperate is like herding cats. Dangerous, murderous cats.

So, he has to take matters into his own hands … especially when the elven beauty Deya catches his eye.

To keep her, and all this women, safe, Mason will have to walk a razor’s edge as he plays a dangerous political game, learns more about the power of runes, and tries to stay one step ahead of the Master.

And to stay one step ahead, maybe it’s time he upgrade his method of transportation …

title: Metal Mage 6

OVERVIEW:

Mason will soon leave Nalnora, but he’s going out with a bang.

As the Master continues to topple and possess the weaker elven Houses, Mason decides to up their offense. Guns might be deadly … but a bazooka decimates.

Especially one powered by runes.

So, with the help of his few elven allies, Mason works to loosen the Master’s grip on Nalnora one last time.

The Master’s army marches for war, but Mason is ready for them.

Mason’s finally returning to Illaria, and he’s not coming back empty handed.

Not only does he now have a beautiful elf on his arm, a badass Mustang, and a shit ton of weapons, he’s also coming back new and improved … and runed.

But things back home in Serin have taken a turn for the worst. Mages have gone missing, the king is worried, and the Master is moving in the shadows.

Mason will have to step up and take charge to protect the kingdom, but he’s never been one to back down from a challenge.
