Possessed mages are closing in on the capital of Serin, but then Mason discovers the Master has managed to brand a few ogres too, and as everyone is quick to tell him, this is bad news. Very bad.

If the Master enslaves the ogres … this war is over before it even begins.

So, Mason, his women, and the half-ogre Haragh must travel to Jagruel, the ogre territory, and thwart the Master’s plan of increasing his army.

The only problem with their plan is that ogres are more inclined to eat Mason than talk to him.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Metal Mage 9
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

A dilemma is defined as two bad choices. In my case it was either continue to work at my soul-crushing corporate law job for the next forty years, or to become the mafia don’s personal attorney.

But I made my decision, and now I plan to defend him from figurative bullets in the courtroom, and literal ones outside of it.

Everybody deserves good counsel, even made men. Justice for all.
title: Mob Lawyer
author: Dave Daren

description:
OVERVIEW:

When I left my corporate law firm in order to become the personal attorney to a chief mafioso, I envisioned glamorous business trips to the Sicilian or Tuscan countryside.

Instead, I get sent Nowheresville, West Virginia in order to close a boring deal, and rather than negotiating with high powered New York businessmen, I’m stuck schmoozing with sleepy local politicians.

But just because a town is small doesn’t make the local good old boys any less corrupt than the mobsters in New York. Or any less deadly.
title: Mob Lawyer 2
author: Dave Daren

description:
OVERVIEW:

In the old days, they called my job “consigliere,” but these days I’m just a young lawyer with a very specialized practice.

For example, my job today is to get rid of a corrupt District Attorney who is in the pocket of a rival organization. In the old days-- actually, I don’t want to think about how they would have handled it in the old days-- These days, I’ll have to run a dark horse political campaign for our preferred candidate without the powers-that-be, the media, or our rivals finding out.

And failure isn’t an option when you work for the mob.
title: Mob Lawyer 3
author: Dave Daren

description:
OVERVIEW:

After thwarting the corrupt Mayor and Brooklyn DA at the polls, their NYPD lackeys are out for our blood and cracking down on our business.
I’m going to have to spend half my day in court defending our guys from petty or trumped up charges and the other half coming up with a plan to expose the Mayor’s ties to organized crime and bring his political machine to the ground.
To do it will require dodging corrupt off-duty NYPD, Serbian gangsters, and the wrath of the recently returned family patriarch who definitely wants to handle things the “old school way.”
title: Mob Lawyer 4
author: Dave Daren

description:
OVERVIEW:

  • Step 1 - Find beautiful monster girl
  • Step 2 - Bed beautiful monster girl
  • Step 3 - Make half-monster-half-human child that has magical abilities with beautiful monster girl
  • Step 4 - Go to Step 1 with different monster girl until an unstoppable horde is made
  • Step 5 - Conquer the world
title: Monster Empire
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

Being the head of a monster-girl homestead isn’t easy. Yeah, there is plenty of awesome sex and cute/horrific monster babies, but Ken Jewell soon has his hands full when a big band of bounty hunters start looking for “Crazy Ken” in the surrounding wilderness.

To grow his small empire, Ken’s going to have to find some new monster women to make clever and strong babies with. And where does a human soldier from Earth find monster girls to make babies with?

The Underdark!

  • Step 1 - Find beautiful monster girl
  • Step 2 - Bed beautiful monster girl
  • Step 3 - Make half-monster-half-human child that has magical abilities with beautiful monster girl
  • Step 4 - Go to Step 1 with different monster girl until an unstoppable horde is made
  • Step 5 - Conquer the world
title: Monster Empire 2
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

The homestead has become a thriving empire of adorably murderous kids, and it looks like Clan Jewell is truly destined for greatness.

Just as long as Ken can keep their enemies at bay and his pregnant monster wives from slaughtering everyone within a ten-mile radius.

Every good soldier has a plan, though. All it’s gonna take is setting up an underdark thieves’ highway and robbing the most powerful man in the region of all his granite.

Which would be a hell of a lot easier if monsters, bounty hunters, and the duke’s soldiers weren’t after Crazy Ken’s family.
title: Monster Empire 3
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

Ken Jewell never intended to have seven different orc armies hunting him down at once.

He also hoped to avoid getting the whole of the duke’s forces up in arms over their infiltrated granite quarry, but things don’t always go as planned.

And every good dad’s gotta learn to roll with the punches.

So… oh well! Looks like it’s time to unleash the cutest little bloodthirsty army this world has ever seen.
title: Monster Empire 4
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

Ken’s got a lot of stuff to do to keep his pregnant monster wives happy, but the most important task is finding the missing duchess before her horrible husband does.

It would be a difficult quest under normal circumstances, but add in a mermaid who has pregnancy cravings, a dwarf who needs granite to build a wall, and a dryad who needs to dive back into the deep, deep underdark to get her trees, and you’ve got another hectic week at Clan Jewell.
title: Monster Empire 5
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

What do you do when you accidentally trigger a cross-dimensional machine created by a mad scientist and teleport to a different version of Earth every 72 hours?

Well, you obviously start recruiting beautiful monster girls and construct a fort, because these worlds are crazy deadly and you’re going to need all the help you can get to survive.

Cambrian Era monstrosities and massive tidal surges caused by an angry moon goddess are pretty nasty challenges for anybody to survive, but a flesh-eating blob that wants to devour all life on Earth? That’s just not fair.

Narration by: Alex Perone, Marissa Parness
Length: 9 Hours, 42 Minutes

When the DEPP transports Dave and Co. to an alternate world where the Aztec Empire had conquered all of North America and sent the Europeans packing, they become mistaken powerful spirits. But it's not easy being a god, and various sides in Aztec politics will try to use Dave to their advantage with deadly results.

And in addition to all that, there is the small matter of the world-eating blob girl to deal with...

Definitely not the most hospitable dimension that the DEPP has transported Dave and Co. to, but as they say, one man’s trash is another man’s treasure. This dying planet may be deadly, but it’s full of potential rewards, and the crew can find the tools they need to build their base in style and comfort.

But none of that matters if the earthquakes tear the planet apart before they shift to the next dimension, and this doomed world becomes their last.

The hideous, unknowable, inter-dimensional Cthulhu-like entities that Sol had warned Dave about are closing in, and they are slowly beginning to reveal their master plan. And if Dave and his ladies can’t figure out a way to stop them, there won’t be any safe dimension to hide.

But before they can even consider that they have to survive an endless night on the horror-world they’ve arrived in: an abandoned Earth where artificially created monsters rule. Who created this army of the damned? And why?

But time is running out, and even if they can locate the Ilquenya home dimension, what can a small group on a tiny base do against the most technologically advanced species in the multiverse?

If Dave is going to triumph once and for all, he’s gonna need a weapon that can destroy an entire planet, and not even Sol’s genius can make something like that quickly and with no resources.

Doom approaches. Can Dave save the universe?

They needed a man to help build their homes.
They needed a man to teach them to survive.
They needed a man to defend them from the evil slaver-pirates.
And most of all, they needed a man to impregnate them and rebuild their population.

Fortunately for them, a man named Ben came from our world to give them everything they needed.

And just in time because the orcs and their greed have arrived on the Cero island.
Now Ben and his crew have to work to fight off another invasion, but they might have the upper hand if they can find out where the remaining land dragons have been hiding.

But a storm knocks them off course, and they end up on another mysterious island.
An island inhabited by winged, butterfly-women who are faced with a deadly and unknown enemy.

Ben and his ever-expanding crew of beautiful monster women have set sail once more and set their sights on a nest of fire-breathing dragons.

If Jonas the soothsayer can rebind the dragons to Ben’s women, Ben will have an unstoppable army he can use to wipe out the orcs.

But the rebinding ceremony is dangerous, and Ben and his crew aren’t the only ones looking to add some dragons to their ranks.

title: Monster Girl Islands 9
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
The complete first season of Monster Girl Journals. Includes the following chapters: 

The Snake Lady’s Lair (Gorgon)

My job as a monster girl hunter and researcher takes me to a lot of places, but the Amazon might be one of the most exotic by far. The locals tell of an ancient temple and a snake-like goddess… who is hungry for men in more than one way. It’s time to take on a gorgon. 

The Find in the Forest (Wendigo)

Tongass National Forest in Alaska is an expanse of rock and cold, but the wendigo’s warm embrace does wonders against the freeze. Somehow, one of the world’s harshest places holds the sweetest monster. 

A Purrfect Pair (Catgirl)

For the first time my research takes me into the big city, and London has more than enough hidey holes for a catgirl to get lost in. Except this time, it’s two for the price of one… 

What a Tangled Web She Weaves (Arachne)

Mammoth Cave National Park has its share of creepy-crawlies, but my next target puts them all to shame. The arachne is my most dangerous girl yet… and she’s going to use all of her eight limbs to tie up my research in ways I’ve never imagined. 

Tentacles, It Had to Be Tentacles (Scylla)

Brisbane, Australia is home to a variety of exotic sea creatures, but none as titillating as the Scylla, or Octopus girl. A cave in the Coral Sea becomes a love nest for a monster girl with more than enough helping hands… er, tentacles. 

Bad Moon Rising (Werewolf)

The Beast of Gevaudan is a werewolf myth that has plagued France for centuries. Now, my search takes me to the base of the Cevennes and the Margeride mountains, into the woods to catch the big, bad wolf. Unless she catches me first…
title: Monster Girl Journals: Season 1
author: J.A. Cipriano

description:
The complete second season of Monster Girl Journals. Includes the following chapters: 

Happy Valentine’s Day (Succubus)

Haven, Michigan seems like a nice, normal place, but men keep going missing, and the marks look suspiciously like a succubus. She’s the ultimate honeypot, a master of looking human, and she could be a lot closer than I think. During my visit, a trip to a local bakery brings me to Viv, a girl just as nice and normal as Haven itself… 

The Luck of the Irish (Leprechaun)

Saint Patrick’s Day in Ireland? How cliche, right? But somewhere in the lush, green fields of Connemara is a tricky monster girl who needs to be put in her place a little. There’s more than gold at the end of the rainbow… 

Going Down the Rabbit Hole (Bunnygirl)

Cambridge, Ohio doesn’t look like it has a lot of action, but the hiking trails and the cabins to rent give me a nice bit of peace in between my travels. But a fluffy-tailed monster girl hops into my life and into my bed, and I finally get to understand all those jokes about rabbits. 

Tree Hugger (Dryad)

Somewhere amidst the Faroe Islands lies Danethorpe, a town straight out of a storybook that still puts a lot of stock in the old ways. During a festival to celebrate May Day and their pagan nature deity, I get up close and personal with their Maiden of Thistledown. I never figured myself for a dendrophiliac before, but dryads prove that even a tree can be sexy. 

Sibling Rivalry (Siren)

Disney might have you believe that mermaids are pretty and sweet, but a visit to Hollow Cape on California’s coast shows me just how ruthless they can be. A few harrowing nights with a set of siren sisters gives me all the research I could want…  and there’s not a seashell bra or a talking crustacean in sight. 

Rocket’s Red Glare (Gargoyle)

Summer in New York City is ungodly hot, and a quest to find a real gargoyle amidst the city’s thousands of statues seems like a Herculean task. My search brings me to Lady Liberty, and as fireworks erupt over the bay, another kind of explosion builds up. She might be made of stone, but she’s softer than you’d think… 

Beam Me Up, Hottie (Alien)

Lancaster, Pennsylvania isn’t exactly known for being an exotic locale, but the monster girls there are out of this world. Nothing like a good ol’ fashioned cattle mutilation and alien abduction to get a guy going. Who ever said my research only had to happen on Earth?
title: Monster Girl Journals: Season 2
author: J.A. Cipriano

description:
The complete third season of Monster Girl Journals. Includes the following chapters:

Drop Dead Gorgeous (Ghost)

Stuck in East Jesus Nowhere, Pennsylvania doesn’t exactly give me a lot of research options, but a tip about an eerie, abandoned girls school brings me a monster that’s hauntingly beautiful. Being able to see a girl is one thing, but being able to see through her? That’s just the kind of weird I’m looking for… 

Frankenstein Girls Will Seem Strangely Sexy (Frankenstein’s Monster)

In the forest around Ingolstadt, Germany, a mysterious scientist has a big secret to show me, and it’s something straight from a horror book… literally. Screams of pleasure or screams of horror? Either way, it’s enough to wake the dead. 

Stuffing the Bird (Harpy)

The mountains of Bucharest aren’t exactly a forgiving place, and neither is the harpy who lies in wait for any unsuspecting prey who might stumble into her nest. If you think cupsize can be impressive on a girl, wait til you get a look at her wingspan… 

Merry Krampus (Krampus)

Driving a Yugo through Austria during the holidays might not sound appealing, but a run-in with a holiday legend ends up making my Christmas both naughty and nice. The Lady Krampus has a lot of treats under her red coat. Good thing I got a big sack and a long list… 

Auld Lang Slime (Slime)

It’s back to London for New Years Eve, but instead of catgirls, the city unearths a new hidden gem. Let the countdown begin for that New Year’s kiss, because it’s finally time to catch me a slime girl. 

An Act of Goddess Worship in More Ways Than One (Aphrodite & Bastet)

Oxfordshire, England is home to the Elysian estate, where not one, but two new monster girls are more than happy to have me as a guest. But Elysian means Heaven for a reason, and the goddesses there require worship from me… and each other. 

Hyde & Seek (Jekyll & Hyde)

I still can’t seem to leave London behind, and I’m now in Mayfair to speak to what might be my most normal woman yet. But Jacquline Hyde is more than just a sexy real estate agent, and her secrets and split personality are giving me whiplash. That’s totally normal though, right? I mean, it’s not like she’s a monster…
title: Monster Girl Journals: Season 3
author: J.A. Cipriano

description:
OVERVIEW:

Doug has a normal, quiet life: he has a decent job, eats a lot of tacos, and plays video games with his best bud Ray.
But it all goes out of control when Ray brings over a chemical he stole from his job, with the ability to turn animals into amazing human-animal hybrids and people into super soldiers.
After Doug accidentally turns his pet Mei into a gorgeous catgirl, Ray’s employers come looking for the stolen formula and “the test subject.”
Doug’s normal, quiet life is over. Now it's a life of adventure, gun fights, seedy hideouts, super hot monster girls, and high tech science. And the best is yet to come.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon

description:

He has the machine to create the serum to make more mutants, and Dr. Lyfe will stop at nothing to get it back. Lyfe’s plan consists of sending teams of highly trains ex-special forces assassins, attack helicopters, and raging, mindless mutant animals at them until they die.
Doug’s counter plan consists of finding Lyfe’s old partner and hoping the disgraced scientist can help them.
But if Doug, Ray, Mei, and Charlotte are going to escape Lyfe’s clutches, it will depend on Doug using all his scientific genius to modify the serum to turn himself into the ultimate weapon.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon

Doug and his posse won’t wait for Lyfe and his assassins to show up: they are going to take the fight to Lyfe and end the mad scientist’s career once and for all, as violently and painfully as possible.

author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

Ronan is a great guitarist and a good singer, but he isn’t destined to be a rich and famous rock star. After a particularly bad bar gig, he follows a seductive voice into darkness and finds himself on the land of Threnos, a dark and haunted fantasy world where demonic evil casts shadows over the realm.

But amid the unspeakable horror of demons from beyond the veil, a small light shines: the Inquisitors, an order of enhanced warriors dedicated to combating demons wherever they exist and at whatever cost. With holy fire, angel blood, and arcane weapons, the Inquisitors fight a never-ending battle against the endless horde of demonic filth.

The games are bloodthirsty and deadly, but Cole and his coven are ready to face anything.

Cole and his coven are ready, though, and Cole has set his sights on expanding his dark harem to include a certain orange-haired witch.

And nothing, not even Elder gods, is going to stand in his way.

Scholomance has been saved… for now. But the war with the elder gods is just beginning.

Cole and his coven must meet with the High Wicca Court and then prepare their Academy for the next attack.

But the elder gods have underestimated just how much Cole wants to see them all dead, and it is a mistake they will pay dearly for.

It’s up to Cole and his coven to help prepare Scholomance for the battle to come.
And to do that, they need to grow their Wicca army.
Quickly.
But where can Cole find magical, Elder hating women on such short notice?

Cole, his coven, and Scholomance have dealt the Elder Gods a massive blow, but the war is far from over.
In fact, it is just beginning.
A mysterious and powerful Elder Goddess has set her seductive sights on Cole, but he’s not as weak as she thinks.
And Cole is determined to take the fight to her.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Scholomance 7: The Devil's Academy
author: Logan Jacobs

OVERVIEW:

Cole has dealt his first blow to the mysterious elder goddess Samara, but their battle is far from over.
Now, Cole and his coven must continue their search for Samara’s remaining artifacts, and their journey takes them into a cold, barren, secret realm, where they seek the help of a village of wild witches.
But Samara is hunting for them. And she won’t rest until Cole’s dead.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Scholomance 8: The Devil's Academy
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The struggle between Cole and the elder goddess Samara is coming to a head. And Cole will stop at nothing until she has submitted to him in body and soul and renounced her holy ways.

Even if he has to storm the elder heavens to tear her from her throne.

title: Scholomance 9: The Devil's Academy
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Cole is the most powerful witch to ever be born.
Except… he’s a man, and there has never been a male witch.
Now Cole is stuck in the Devil’s Academy full of evil women who want to destroy him.
To survive, he’ll have to perform a dark ritual that enslaves the beautiful witches to him.
They’ll hate serving a man, of course, but that just makes the conquest over their bodies, minds, and souls that much sweeter.

Disclaimer: This novel contains horrific violence, a harem, and deviant mind control sexual escapades.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Scholomance: The Devil's Academy
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

FBI agent Nate Cole is a talented investigator with a by-the-books reputation, but when his team was ambushed and killed while busting a human trafficking ring, his life changed forever.

As he recovered from a bite wound, he discovered the truth: the supernatural exists, and the danger is very real.

Joined by his beautiful partner, Agent Lucy Gray, together they will work to expose the truth. But the most shocking truth they uncover is about Agent Cole himself, that he is a werewolf, and this power within may be the key to saving humanity from the monsters among us.

This is a harem series.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Secret Agent: Werewolf
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

Agent Cole has embraced his heritage as a werewolf and uncovered the vampiric horrors pulling the strings of our society. Along with the beautiful and talented duo of Agent Gray and Veronica Nowak, he’s been recruited by the CIA in their shadow war against the international vampire order.

A vampire minion carrying a powerful artifact linked to werewolf breeding has gone missing in a small rural Vermont village, and the Agency has sent the trio to investigate and, if possible, retrieve it.

But this won’t just be a typical missing person case, even one involving vampires. A secret and sinister supernatural entity holds power here, and it covets the artifact as well. Cole might be the Lupe Alpha, but he will need more than claw and fangs to survive the coming of the Endless Storm.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Secret Agent: Werewolf 2
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

Bodyguarding two beautiful twins on their journey to a poker tournament wasn’t my normal type of work as a wandering Sellsword, but the pay is good and the ladies weren’t hard on the eyes.

But as I quickly learned, there was more than meets the eye to these twins, and trouble follows them everywhere.

What should be a simple excursion is very likely to end in a blood bath, and it would take all my skills to make sure none of it was mine.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Sellsword 2: The Amoral Hero
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

One of my rules is that I’ll always sell my sword to the highest bidder.

Normally, that’s a metaphor, but when my trusty steed Theo and I found ourselves in a small town being destroyed by two wealthy feuding families, it’s quite literal.

If I can play them off each other just right, I’ll walk away a very wealthy man. If I screw up, there might not be anybody left alive to pay me.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Sellsword 3: The Amoral Hero
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The Great West stretched on endlessly, and it was filled with pioneer mining towns, magic, and opportunity.

But it was also filled with brigands, monsters, and the unknown.

Fortunately, I was around to protect people. For a price that is.

And I only have three simple rules. My code, if you will:
I’ll kill anything or anyone for a price.
I get paid up front.
I leave town right after I’ve performed my task… and enjoyed whatever townswomen offer themselves to me as a bonus.

They call me a hero, but I’m just out here looking to get rich.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Sellsword: The Amoral Hero
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

I never wanted to become a good little soldier for my werebear clan. My dream was to cook good food for hungry people, shifter and human alike, and I’d been successful at selling sandwiches out of my apartment for a while before The Boss sent his cronies after me.

I was able to prove my skills in the kitchen, and The Boss offered me a deal I couldn’t refuse.

But my only chance to make the fifty thousand dollars I needed to buy my freedom is a local cooking competition. Am I good enough to buy the life I’ve always dreamed of?


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Shifter Chef: A Harem Cooking Adventure
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

Lord of the Rings + Breaking Bad + The Sopranos = Skulduggery

It’s a world ruled by elves, and they have decided that alcohol and magic is illegal for all the other races.
But I know how to make whiskey. In fact, that’s the easy part.
Selling it under their noses and not getting caught and hung will be the hard part.
I’ll need to build a crew, I’ll need to slit some throats, and I’ll need to be five steps ahead of our overlords.
Wanna join me in building a criminal empire?

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Skulduggery 1: Building a Criminal Empire
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
Overview:

Lord of the Rings + Breaking Bad + The Sopranos = Skulduggery

We’re starting to make some coin, but I’m always looking to improve.

So, how can I sell more whiskey and make even more gold?

Double cross my distributor? Buy new businesses to serve as fronts for my operations? Steal a few precious artifacts from those blue-blooded elves?

Yep. All of the above, and we’ll kill anyone who gets in our way.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Skulduggery 2: Building a Criminal Empire
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Lord of the Rings + Breaking Bad + The Sopranos = Skulduggery

The best part of being a human is everyone constantly underestimates you, and that means they never see it coming when your dagger plunges into their heart.

Our business is growing, but so is our list of enemies. Dwarven gangsters? The Assassins Guild? The commander of the Elven Guard?

Yup, they are all problems for us as we expand our criminal operation throughout the realm, and we gotta get rid of ‘em all if we’re going to make mountains of gold.

Fortunately, they’ll never see it coming.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Skulduggery 3: Building a Criminal Empire
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Lord of the Rings + Breaking Bad + The Sopranos = Skulduggery

With each rival my syndicate eliminates two more appear, and they are out for blood. The assassin’s guild, the dwarven miners, and the elven overlords are all looking to put our heads on a pike.

If my whiskey business is going to thrive it's going to take a little magic, all of their skills, a lotta luck, and the help of an enslaved djinn to overcome the odds against them.

The risk is high, but the rewards are money, power, women, and revolution. Those are worth dying and killing for, so keep your blades sharp.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Skulduggery 4: Building a Criminal Empire
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Me and my bootlegging crew have had runaway success moving our illicit product throughout the city, and many of our rivals have been eliminated or brought into the family.

Unfortunately, this success has drawn the attention of the domineering elven authorities, including the Guildmaster of the Thieves’ Guild and the Captain of the City Guard.
I’ll have to get the authorities off our backs, keep the whiskey flowing, and continue to follow the lead of my magic keys.

Or we’ll all end up dead.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Skulduggery 5: Building a Criminal Empire
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
Nothing goes on in this city without me knowing about it. We run the whiskey business. We run the brothels.

But it's not all fun and games: while we’ve eliminated our smaller rivals and obstacles, there are still powerful forces in the Elven empire and their Dwarven toadies who could topple our criminal empire. But the tide has turned, and soon our enemies will be dead, or they’ll be turned into allies.

We have to play it smart, because this isn’t about running rackets in one city. It’s about moving into every city and then toppling the Elven empire before they even know the danger they are in.

One drink at a time.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Skulduggery 6: Building a Criminal Empire
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
For the last several months, our whiskey business has expanded throughout the city like a virus, and we’ve gotten rich and powerful. The time to step out of the shadows, grab power, and make my mark on the world is now.


Our enemies are lined up, and now it's time to knock them down like dominoes. Once the last one falls, we’ll own the city lock, stock, and barrel.


The elves won’t know their empire is doomed until it’s too late for them to stop us.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Skulduggery 7: Building a Criminal Empire
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
Being a big fish in a small pond is great, but being the biggest fish in the biggest pond is even better, and now that we have the ability to expand our whiskey business to every city in the elven empire, that’s exactly what I’ll be:
The richest crime lord in the realm.
But I’m not in this for the money anymore, so I’m not gonna rest until the last elf has paid the price for their crimes.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Skulduggery 8: Building a Criminal Empire
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
The decadent, oppressive, and disgusting Elven Empire is teetering in the wind, ready to be toppled. One strong push, and the whole thing will come crashing down.
That, my friends, is where I come in.
Today we’ll light a fire under the elves and we’ll watch their empire go up in flames. There will still be long nights and hard fighting ahead of us if we want to gain our freedom, but in the end it will all be worthwhile.
Let the streets run blue with the blood of the tyrants!

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Skulduggery 9: Building a Criminal Empire
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Being able to rip the soul out of a creature, store it in a precious gem, and use it to cast spells might make me the most powerful student at the Astra Argent Magical Academy. Only I can’t tell anybody about it.
Because it's illegal, and they’ll kill me if they find out.
But they need me whether they know it yet or not, so I’m going to capture a lot of souls and cast a lot of spells.
This is gonna be a crazy semester.

This is a monster-girl harem dark-magic academy story.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Soul Gem Collector
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Ever since I discovered that I can kill magical creatures, trap their souls in precious gems, and use them to cast spells of my own, I haven’t had a moment’s rest.

I have to balance my academics with learning how to use my powers and capture more souls in more gems to grow my spell collection. All the while avoiding angry aristocrats, nosy professors, criminal mobsters, and evil dwarves bent on destroying the civilized kingdoms.

Luckily, I have some handy magic, a super awesome foxgirl and the hottest elven girl in school by my side, so nothing can stop me.

Unless she finds out I have her ex-boyfriends’ soul trapped in a ruby in my pocket...

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Soul Gem Collector 2
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

A month ago, I was a lowly alchemist who was glorified handyman for the magic academy.

Then I learned I had the contraband ability to capture the souls of magical beings inside gems and use them to cast magic of my own.

Now I’m the big man on campus, I’m rubbing shoulders with the elite of our kingdom, and I’m trying to topple a crime syndicate that’s working with our worst enemies.
But my biggest problem? Managing my time with three beautiful girlfriends while keeping my secret under wraps.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Soul Gem Collector 3
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

I’m playing a dangerous game working for a crime syndicate while trying to overthrow them from within.

And when the crime syndicate is working with our country’s mortal enemies to destroy our kingdom and will do anything to keep that information private, I have tread very carefully.

But thanks to my talented and beautiful girlfriends, and my ability to capture souls in gems to cast magical spells, nothing is going to stop me.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Soul Gem Collector 4
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The Iron dwarves didn’t know what hit them, or more appropriately: what destroyed their batch of explosives.

Now they are putting pressure on my “employers” to deliver them a new shipment, and the bastard dwarves want to watch me make it with their own eyes. The danger is clear now, and one misstep could cost me, and my beautiful women, their lives.

But no one expects a human to have magic, let alone soul gem magic, and if I play the game just right, I’ll be able to save the kingdom.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Soul Gem Collector 5
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The Iron Dwarves are poised to launch an all out attack, and nobody knows about it but us. We must warn the King so he can be alerted to the impending disaster, but there is one small problem with that: we’re wanted criminals on the run.

My women and I have arcane magic, powerful connections, and sneaky cunning, and we’re going to need all three of them to figure out how to warn the King and save the world without losing our heads in the process.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Soul Gem Collector 6
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

In a universe where technology and magic co-exist, Nicholas Lyons desires one thing: to serve his queen as a Space Knight in the Royal Trident Forces. But when his final mission as an Academy cadet goes horribly wrong, Nicholas discovers he possesses illegal magical abilities that grant him power far beyond that of a normal man, knight, or mage.

When a clandestine assignment lands Nicholas on the worst starship in the kingdom’s fleet, he finds a motley crew of warriors hiding their own terrible secret. Death and betrayal lurk around every corner, and Nicholas finds himself torn between his loyalties to his new crew or the oath he swore to his queen.

And death no matter which choice he makes.
title: Space Knight
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

Nick and his half-crazed uncle have finally reunited with the crew of the RTF Stalwart, but the welcome party is a frosty one.

It’ll take more than a few hugs to get his crew to trust the Lich knight who’s been helping the Dax for years, not to mention the Dax commander Nick has brought home as his newest mate.

But when signs of the Dark Folk god start showing up in unexpected places, old differences must be set aside for the sake of progress.

Especially once the queen herself gets caught in the crosshairs.

As the kingdom falls into a frenzy, it’s up to the worst ship in the galaxy to root out Caledonia’s traitors once and for all.

Note: This title does not allow MP3 downloads
title: Space Knight 10
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

To protect the crew against betrayal, Captain Cross sends the Stalwart on a training mission to Ecoma, a gas giant populated by evolved humans with dangerous empathic abilities.

The journey was supposed to be easy: Acquire training from the evolved humans, negotiate the use of magical devices that can protect the knights from mind control, and get a bit of R&R.

Of course, nothing is ever easy with the Stalwart, and Squire Nicholas Lyons soon finds himself battling for his life against sensual mind readers, hordes of bloodthirsty Grendels, enemy kingdom warriors, and a berserker knight named Olav.
title: Space Knight 2
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

The Stalwart’s crew have obtained the Ecomese implants, but when their next mission takes them to a far-off space station, they encounter a series of setbacks that can only be overcome by two men:

Squire Nicholas Lyons and Leith Manzo the Slayer.

Precision is their forte, and there is no lord, knight, pirate, or cyborg they cannot slay.
title: Space Knight 3
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

The knighthood examination has arrived. 

Few squires pass the initial round, and even fewer make it through the final test alive. The odds are stacked against every squire, but the Stalwart crew uncovers a Pure-Blood noble conspiracy to sabotage Nick and his friends. 

But Nicholas welcomes the opposition. This is the moment of his dreams, and nothing will stop the Stalwart squires from entering the illustrious order of Space Knights.
title: Space Knight 4
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

While the Stalwart and most of the crew head to the Aquitania on a diplomatic diversion mission, Moses and Treyin take Nick and the other newly minted knights to the mountain city of an inconsequential planet for a clandestine mission to conquer the next Seraphic Portal.

But the Dax are hot on their tails, so Nick and his friends must push their new powers to the limit and save a planet that is unprepared for the horrors of Dax enslavement.
title: Space Knight 5
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

Nick, Moses, Treyin, and the other new knights are finally reuniting with the Stalwart after their victory over a Dax fleet. They’re overloaded with loot and are looking at a hefty payday…

But the celebrations will have to wait.

The Dax are planning to attack Aquitania, and if Nick and the Stalwart crew can’t convince the Aquitanians to work together with the Caledonian Kingdom, the Triumvirate is doomed.
title: Space Knight 6
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

Nick and the rest of the Stalwart crew have temporarily saved Aquitaine from a Dax invasion, but there is little time to rest. 

If the Triumvirate kingdoms are going to survive both the Dax and the Grendels, alliances will have to be made. So, in between their continuing search for King Justinian’s armor, the Stalwart must now travel to Rutheni, where many secrets come to life.
title: Space Knight 7
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

The crew of the RTF Stalwart have taken on some of the wildest missions, but traveling to Dobuni to meet with the most powerful Lich knight in the galaxy was something Nick never imagined doing.

Now, the first secrets he’s uncovering about the crew and his own past promise to change everything about his future.

But with the Dax army bearing down, there’s hardly time to process.

The strength of the Triumvirate is about to be tested to its greatest bounds, and it’s time for the soldiers of Caledonia, Rutheni, and Aquitaine to join together as one force at last.

Note: This title does not allow MP3 downloads
title: Space Knight 8
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

It isn’t every day a Caledonian knight finds themselves hiding out on the Dax homeworld, but serving on the RTF Stalwart has made Nick a pro at rolling with the punches.

The way he sees it, this is a rare opportunity to cripple the Dax from the inside and free the innocent, but with Volkan Mega City One crawling with Star Spears, he’ll have to take a creative approach.

Luckily, his wacky Lich knight uncle is ready to assist. Unluckily, he’s been dabbling with the most dangerous magic in existence for a hundred and sixty years.

Nick has never faced such perilous odds, but sometimes getting the right man behind enemy lines is all it takes to change the entire direction of an age-old war.

Note: This title does not allow MP3 downloads
title: Space Knight 9
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

Nobody in the land of Spellforge will help Steven rebuild Lina’s family wizard’s tower and reignite its forge. Some oppose them through fear: fear of change, fear of another independent wizard, and most of all, fear of the power of dual magic spellcards.

Other sinister wizards oppose them because of their own arcane plans for domination of Spellforge, and they will not tolerate an upstart challenger. So Steven, Lina the Hunter, and Rani the Illusion Mage will have to do it all on their own.

But building a forge is neither easy, nor safe. To gather the magical items they need, they will have to venture to Mortua, a maleficent land where the dead walk, and the living either master them, or become them.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Spellforge 2: Collect Spells - Dominate the World
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Steven Phillips, professional programmer aka code monkey, always wanted to quit his boring job and make games instead, but when he finds a bizarre card in a storage facility he is transported to the amazing world of Spellforge, where magic is real and life is a game for survival.

Wizards in Spellforge buy, sell, trade, and gather materials to forge spell cards that they use to murder each other in the magical arena… and outside of it. The world is divided among several magical schools who jealously guard control of their forges to prevent any deviant forms of spell cards from being created, and only the most powerful wizards become rich and independent enough to build their own private forges.

To dominate the Spellforge, Steven will have to tackle the toughest challenges, win the biggest prizes, and forge the most powerful spells. Only the strongest can survive for long in the crucible of the Spellforge.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Spellforge: Collect Spells - Dominate the World
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
What would you do if an evil empress was enslaving the galaxy? Well, kick her ass, free the slaves, and roar defiantly. Well, you would if you were a dragon.

When David Briggs beats the final level of Star Conqueror, that’s exactly what happens to him. Gaining the power to become a fire-breathing dragon and recruited by alien freedom fighters, he has one chance to save the galaxy.

There’s just one problem.

To stop her, he will have to break the mind control of a million super-hot female warriors, storm a hundred planets, and fight through armies of mechs.

Then again, you know what they say, if you want to save the world, you better bring a dragon.

Please Note: This novel contains a harem. You have been warned.
title: Star Conqueror
author: J.A. Cipriano

description:
OVERVIEW:

To save the galaxy, Adam and his wives must conquer the remaining three Nordar Blood Overlord Clans. But when the Queen of the Idonan Clan escapes capture, the six most veteran of the Valkyries challenge the new king to mortal combat.

These are women who have never lost in combat to a man, but they are about to learn what happens when you catch a tiger by his tail.
title: Star Justice 10: Teeth & Claws
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

Adam and his wives set their sights on the last of the Nordar Blood Overlord Clans. The Jotnar are devious, powerful, and know that the tiger is coming for them.

Our heroes have hatched a daring plan to sneak behind the Jotnar lines. To most, it would be suicide, but to Adam, it is just another day of being the galaxy’s more powerful King. Nothing will stand in his way, and finally the clans will be united.
title: Star Justice 11: King of Kings
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

Adam is now the Nordar King of Kings and the most powerful human ruler to ever exist.

Except he isn’t human.
He knows that he is Tiger.
He knows that he has to save the universe.

But all kings have enemies, and it’s time to deliver some fucking payback.
Elaka Nota is responsible for the agony and torture that Adam’s wife Eve has endured, and the best way to remedy this is to take their most prized possessions.
Possessions that might be Adam’s best chance at destroying the Draugr.
title: Star Justice 12: Red Nova
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

A Paranormal Space Opera Adventure

Adam’s quest to destroy the SAVO is in its final phase. He has his unstoppable Space Viking navy, his Tiger powers, and his band of beautiful and deadly women. He’s just missing one thing:

A fleet that can take him and his fighting force 90,000 light-years away to the other side of the Milky Way.

Fortunately, Adam knows where to find the last two Shadow Eagles, and no corp, alien, or pirate will prevent him from adding the beautiful dark angels to his harem.
title: Star Justice 13: Apex Predators
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

A Paranormal Space Opera Adventure

The final battle between Adam and the unstoppable SAVO has arrived.

Odin’s avatar has his amazing wives, an army of tiger-men soldiers, vampire witches, goddess-angel space-ships, and an entire Space Viking navy.

But the draugr are older than the galaxy itself, and their evil and hunger cannot be measured by any mortal.

And their queen knows that Adam is coming.

She’s been waiting an eternity to destroy him.
title: Star Justice 14
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

Imprisoned and subjected to brutal genetic experiments, space marine Adam has been changed into a perfect predator. A super-soldier that is part man, part tiger, and all killing machine.

When his latest mission has an unexpected outcome, Adam finds himself free of his explosive control collar and honor-bound to protect a mysterious woman. Now he is on an alien planet, and they are both being hunted by the most powerful mega-corporation in the solar system. Their only escape lays at the helm of an experimental starship hidden beyond countless layers of military security.

All Adam has is his military training, sense of honor, and a beautiful woman who needs to drink blood to live.

It is time to let the tiger out.
title: Star Justice 1: Eye of the Tiger
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

Adam, Eve, and Z have successfully escaped the grasp of the Elaka Nota Corporation. Their plan was simple: arrive at the trading outpost on Gliese 876 - C’s moon, look for honest work, and buy supplies for their strange new starship.

But the team soon finds themselves fighting for the freedom of an entire planet, and the weretiger space marine, powerful vampire, and snarky hacker will have to use all their abilities to survive.
title: Star Justice 2: Space Witch
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

Adam, Eve, and Z have narrowly escaped the clutches of Elaka Nota Corporation and exited hyperspace around the orbit of Queen’s Hat Station- where they intend to re-stock and repair Persephone. Instead, our heroes find themselves in the middle of an undercover police operation, gang war, and terrorist plot that threatens the two million innocent citizens of the immense space station.

The clock is ticking, and failure means that Adam will lose the person that he owes his life to: Eve.
title: Star Justice 3: Zeta Hack
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

Following the hint given by Persephone, the crew arrives at planet Y-114-a. What they find throws them into an impossible struggle against an army of deadly robots, a corrupt corporation wishing to enslave the planet, and an evil that is more ancient than the galaxy.

And this time, they might not all make it out alive.
title: Star Justice 4: Binary Pair
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

The crew of Persephone only has 300 days to find help for the planet of Uraniel. They return to Queen’s Hat Station with hopes of recruiting more people for their ship, or finding any leads about the super-powered aliens threatening the galaxy.

To win the day, Mickey will have to use powers he didn’t even know he had, infiltrate an underground base filled with bloodthirsty mutants, and defeat an indestructible enemy. It might be tough, but if there’s one thing Mickey knows how to do, it’s kick ass and get the girl. And he’s already got the girls…

Please Note: This book contains a harem.
title: Super Human 2: United We Stand
author: J.A. Cipriano

description:
The city’s been through a lot of hard times lately, and everyone could use a break from the chaos. And what better way than with the All-Heroes Invitational, where the caped crusaders can let their hair down and strut their stuff, without any buildings getting destroyed?

Heroes of every stripe team up to compete for fun, bragging rights, and to raise money to help keep the city they protect running. But ‘teamwork’ can be a four-letter word to some of the crimefighters in town, and the lists of grudges are long. While Mickey and company try to settle their own books with a few of the bigger egos in the super community, a villain with a mind like a steel trap has been waiting for his chance to strike- and this tournament might just be the perfect opportunity…
title: Super Human 3: Victory Road
author: J.A. Cipriano

description:
The Champion. The World’s First Hero. Who is he? Where did he come from? Why did he leave? No one knows, but Mickey just may have found the key to finding him and the source of his unimaginable power. And he’d better hurry. At least if he wants to keep any of the city’s supervillains from finding it first.

Please Note: This book contains a harem.
title: Super Human 4: The Search for Truth
author: J.A. Cipriano

description:
My name is Jake. At least, I think it is. That’s what the note in my pocket said when I woke up in this jungle, but it said a bit more than that. It gave me two assignments: Survive the monsters and breed with as many women as possible. The future of the human race depends on you.

So… There's a lot I’m pretty confused about.

The beautiful women I’ve found in this jungle are just as lost, and they had their own note that told them to breed with the strongest man they could find. They seem to trust me enough to team up in figuring out what the hell is going on, but we’re finding more alarming mysteries everywhere we explore in this jungle.

Why are we so strong? Why are we trapped here with these crazy monsters?

And why are these gorgeous women as compelled to breed with me as I am with them?

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Survive the Monsters and Breed
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
There’s gotta be a door out of this crazy, monster-infested building, and my group and I are determined to find it.

Unfortunately, the new women in this barren desert room aren’t as willing to team up as we hoped. They’ve got blood on their hands, weapons at the ready, and their own new style of monsters to slay in here.

So it looks like I’m completely outnumbered by beautiful women in this deadly maze, and most of them are growing more and more eager to breed with me.

author: Logan Jacobs

This swamp has been hiding more than savage monsters.

The people we meet in here have secrets I never saw coming, and they could be the key to figuring out just how much is really going on in this massive, monster-infested rooms.

But finally gaining some answers has taught me one crucial thing: I’m the ticket to getting us all out of here for good.

Now the question is, can I do it before our time runs out?

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Survive the Monsters and Breed - Book 3
author: Logan Jacobs

It’s not just the mutant monsters I’m worried about in this massive tundra. It’s the hulking, murdering, genetically modified people who are prowling the snowscape and leaving carnage in their wake.

They’re our primary targets.

But tracking them and taking them down will mean playing a dangerous game in frigid temperatures.

And it looks like my women and I aren’t the only ones in this icy wasteland who are tiptoeing around these evil bastards.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Survive the Monsters and Breed - Book 4
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
Being trapped in a monster-infested building where everything wants to kill you is challenging enough.

But being trapped in pitch-black underground tunnels with huge, mutant bugs?

That’s really the stuff of nightmares.

What my women and I find down here will change everything, though. And the people we meet will turn our understanding of this place on its head.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon

If my women and I make it to the other side of this thing, the entire human race might just be better for it.

Because it’s time to do more than survive.

It’s time to get out of here and truly thrive.

description:
OVERVIEW:

Control dinosaurs.
Tame women.
Rule the world.

Victor Shelby ends each day wondering when his life is going to get better. His parents are dead, he struggles to pay rent, and his boss at the animal control shelter has him cleaning cages instead of working in the field. His dream of helping animals seems destined to end in a mop bucket.

Then Victor is abducted by aliens and deposited on a prehistoric world filled with hungry dinosaurs and beautiful alien women.

He doesn’t know why he is here or what his purpose is, but he finds himself fighting for survival. Most men would have been lizard kibble in a few moments, but Victor’s natural ability to empathize with animals has grown stronger, and he finds himself able to control the most docile of the terrible lizards.

Victor will have to use his taming powers to provide food, water, and shelter for the three women that he has sworn to protect. Success means they get to live another day, failure means a horrible death in the jaws of Earth’s most deadly predators.

Disclaimer: This book has ravaging dinosaurs, a lot of cursing, extreme violence, and a harem of exotic alien women. The novel is not meant for people under the age of 18.

ictor Shelby and his tribe have overcome numerous challenges. But how will Victor beat a villain who has a superior version of his power? And what if that villain has hundreds of powerful dinosaurs in his army?

I was just a nerd for crying out loud. A college student just doing his best to survive.

But apparently fate has plans for me, because one day I was just Jesse Rafe, and the next day I’m The Alpha, the legendary were shifter who is meant to impregnate every possible shifter species omega female and rule the world.

If I don’t get killed by another alpha first, of course.

So now, I’m turning the tables on them. I’m making a mad grab for as many betas as I can gain, and if the sheer size of my pack brings the head of the agency himself down on us, then so be it.

We’re ready and waiting to give him a nice, bloody welcome.

It’s starting to look like we’re stalking a maniac across Scotland, but this game he’s playing could put more than just shifters in danger.

Oh yeah, and he’s one of the largest, most powerful, and elusive shifter species in the world.

So this should get interesting.

But this is what The Alpha was made for. It’s my duty first and foremost to protect my kind, and thanks to my ever-growing following, I’ve got a few tricks up my sleeve.

And a few seriously powerful allies ready to vouch for me.

But this is too far.

I won’t stand aside and allow anyone to try and commit genocide against my kind.

Even if they’re the president of a dangerous country, they will learn what happens when you cross The Alpha. Because my allies litter the globe now, and their numbers are only growing with each passing day.

Not to mention, the number of shifter species in existence.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon

Venezuela is safe, but a new problem is rising quickly in Peru. Shifters are rioting and murdering in Lima, and it’s up to my pack and me to end the violence.

But first, we have a birthday to celebrate and an Agency to start. Then we’re off to another South American country to try and save as many lives as we can.

Hopefully, my pack and I can stop the madness and rescue as many innocent people as possible from this hate-filled massacre.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon

Thankfully, we’ve got the numbers and military support on our side, and I can only hope we’ll finally be able to bring peace to both shifters and humans around the world.

Life just never seems to slow down anymore, and with someone new stalking us through our own woods, I can’t afford to set one paw out of line.

But these guys don’t seem like our usual species of enemies.

I’m not the same pup I was when I first found out I was a werewolf, and my shifter powers are growing strong enough to complicate things. There’s also a certain stubborn agent who still hasn’t learned that I call the shots around here.

And her story brings up the ghosts of my family’s past.

Something big is headed our way now, but an unexpected new power of mine just might turn this fight in our favor.

The north has been silent since my pack mauled over a hundred of Theo Finch’s betas.

Too quiet.

But I’ve waited long enough. It’s time to hunt down my parents’ killer and slaughter that alpha once and for all.

Unfortunately, he seems to be one step ahead of us, and closing in on him in the middle of his enormous territory will take more planning and money than I’ve ever invested in a mission before.

Then again, now that I’m rich and only getting richer, I may as well destroy my enemies in style.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon

I just wanted to take a vacation.

Classes are out for the summer, my vast territory is locked down, and my family and I are set for a full month touring California with Jack Nolan’s orchestra.

But it’s a little hard to relax as The Alpha. There’s always more packs to conquer and land to take over.

Not to mention, more omegas to claim.

And the whole situation reeks of government corruption.

So it’s time to take matters into my own hands and sniff out the rat myself. But with Hazel Wise as my personal informant, the task is proving much more enjoyable than I’d anticipated.

And waaaay bloodier.

Just so much shifter blood.

Everywhere.

Alex’s enemies want him dead so they can take his wives and estate, but they don’t know Alex isn’t from their world.

Alex has defeated another one of his enemies in Archus Doler, but evil still lurks in the shadows of Nata Isle.
Lord Asher Mec invites his two beautiful magical sisters to help investigate, but Alex and his family are still in danger.
And he’ll stop at nothing to keep them safe.

Alex has once again increased his Duelist rank and the size of his holdings and estates.
He’s also become quite enamored with one of the Asher Lord’s mage sisters, but more and more mysteries and questions keep popping up in the world of Aventoll.
Alex will have to keep his wits about him to stay one step ahead of his enemies, and he might even have to leave Nata Isle to find the answers he seeks.

description:
My name is Roy Morgan, and I’m not your average Atlanta cop. For one, most of them don’t have to kill people to stay alive. I do. It’s a half-demon thing. Yep, that’s right, half-demon. It’s awesome, especially since I’m half-warlock too, and those two sides don’t much get along.

Still, that and a buck will get you a candy bar. So it’s all good.

Or at least it was.

See, I had this dumb idea to stop a robbery in progress and have myself a snack. Turns out these weren’t your run of the mill robbers. No, these were demonic slavers, there to capture the district attorney and sell her off to the highest bidding demon in Hell.

Now if I want to stop them, I’m going to have to fight my way through a city full of hellfire-flinging, gun-toting, spell-weaving demons.

My name is Roy Morgan, and I think I’ll have seconds.
