description:
Armed with his trusty hammer, the King’s Champion Gharrik Anzar is known for two things: Slaying his enemies and conquering women. But when a portal to another world opens in the middle of his homeland and monsters begin to pour through, he’ll have a new mission. Step through the portal, kill everything that stands in his way, and stop whoever is sending the monsters through.

There’s just one problem.

He can’t bring anything through the portal, and the technology on the other side is… well… lacking.

In order to win, he’ll have to build an army out those he finds on the other side, outfit them with weapons and armor they’ve never seen before, and then march them through a battalion of undead, orcs, and ogres. It sounds impossible, but if it didn’t, they wouldn’t send the hammer.

Please Note: This Novel contains a Harem.
title: The Hammer
author: J.A. Cipriano

description:
Gharrick Anzar has conquered many women, and taken much land, but now he’ll meet his toughest challenge yet. A succubus has laid claim to the most valuable treasure in the world, and she hungers for more.

But if there’s one thing Gharrick knows how to do, it’s satisfy the urges of even the most ruthless women, and this time, he may not even need his hammer to do it.

Assuming, of course, he can vanquish the elder gods she’s summoned forth from the pit.
title: The Hammer: Book 2
author: J.A. Cipriano

description:
OVERVIEW:

The bad guys won.

Earth’s most powerful superheroes are dead, and the victorious supervillains have taken over the planet and are systematically killing those with the super-gene to prevent anyone who can oppose their ironclad rule from ever rising up against their totalitarian rule.

My super-gene activated while I was in line to be tested at a “government” facility, and I used my ability to escape, but I’m done hiding. Somebody needs to step up, unite the remaining heroes, and topple this supervillain dictatorship. And that somebody is me.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: The Last Superheroes
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

We gave the supervillains a humiliating black eye on national TV, and it sent a message nobody could miss:

Superheroes are back, and the LNP is doomed.

But it won’t be so simple, the LNP have massive resources and are totally ruthless and they are willing to kill as many innocents as it takes to draw us out in the open where they can kill us easily.

The empire, as they say, is going to strike back, and we’re going to be in for the fight of our lives.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: The Last Superheroes 2
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The Wonder League have proven to people that superheroes are back and they will stand up to the sinister forces of the LNP.

Theo’s plan is to expose the worst evils of the LNP for all the public to see because he knows that if there is a mass revolt, even the mighty LNP won’t be able to survive. Earl Johns, leader of the LNP has his own plan: hunt down the Wonder League, absorb their powers, and kill them.

Theo and his super-powered friends and lovers will have to manage surviving the largest nationwide manhunt in history while simultaneously exposing the evils of the LNP.

This is a job for the Wonder League.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: The Last Superheroes 3
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The Wonder League revealed the horrible truth of the LNP to the American public, and the people have begun to revolt against their supervillain overlords.

Theo and the rest of the Wonder League now plan to exploit the chaos to strike at the heart of the LNP and cripple their power and, if successful, topple President Johns once and for all.

But Johns is no fool, and he has plans of his own. As the most powerful super on Earth, the arch-villain was smart and strong enough to eliminate all the mighty heroes once before, and unless Theo is one step ahead, he could fall into the same trap and leave Johns victorious and in power forever.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: The Last Superheroes 4
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
For the first time in millennia, the all-consuming Darkness has been pushed back. Thanks to Arthur and his ragtag army of women, there’s finally a light at the end of the tunnel. Or there would have been if Mammon, Princess of Greed hadn’t awakened. Powerful enough to level a town with the blink of an eye and ally to no one, Mammon has one goal and one goal only.

To own everything in Hell, starting with Arthur and his friends.

And if he can’t stop her from taking over while fending off attacks from Hell’s ruling class, well, let’s just say that his chance to stop the Darkness will slip from slim to none.
title: The Legendary Builder 2: The Builder's Greed
author: J.A. Cipriano

description:
When Arthur defeated Mammon, he never expected Lucifer to awaken, and what’s more, she’s made Arthur an offer he can’t refuse. Join her in the fight against the Darkness or face the consequences. On one hand, it’s a good deal. On the other, well, it’s Lucifer. Worse, she’s not the only one who woke up.

Wrath has broken free. Envy is insane. And Lust? Well, Lust is just looking for a big strong man to… well, you know. To Death. Still, if there’s one thing Arthur’s gotten good at, it’s dealing with cranky Archangels. There’s just one problem. Heaven’s about to fall, and when it does, the Darkness’s champion will march on Hell.

Guess Arthur better fix his sword. Fast.
title: The Legendary Builder 3: The Builder's Pride
author: J.A. Cipriano

description:
After Dred laid waste to Heaven, defeated Lucifer, and kidnapped Gabriella, Arthur will do anything to stop him, even if it means teaming up with Hell’s greatest enemy.

Armed with a sword more powerful than ever, Arthur has one chance to rebuild Heaven, forge an alliance between the angels and demons, and find the Holy Grail.

If he succeeds, he may just have the power he needs to defeat Dred and rescue Gabriella, but if he fails, well, at least the convenience store is still hiring.
title: The Legendary Builder 4: The Builder's Wrath
author: J.A. Cipriano

description:
When Arthur Curie learns of a chink in the Darkness’s armor, he knows it’s his chance to turn the tide in a millennia old conflict. There’s just one problem.

To take that chance, he’ll have to risk his entire army, side with a former enemy, and defeat forces of Darkness far greater than he’s ever faced before. But you know what they say, no guts, no glory, right?
title: The Legendary Builder 5: The Builder's Conquest
author: J.A. Cipriano

description: When Arthur found a magic sword in a pawnshop, he never thought it would make him into the Builder of Legend and thrust him into the forefront of the fight with the Darkness. Now, on a mission only he can complete, Arthur and his girls will have to hold the lines against the Darkness’s final assault while defeating the four horsemen, freeing God from captivity, and of course, confronting the Empress. Sure, the odds might be stacked against him, but if there’s anyone who can do it, it’s the penniless orphan turned King of Heaven and Hell.
title: The Legendary Builder 6: The Builder's Conquest
author: J.A. Cipriano

description:
Arthur never expected to wind up in Hell. At least, not because he found an ancient sword in a pawnshop. To make matters worse, Hell isn’t as he thought. It’s a desolate wasteland under siege by an all-consuming void known as the Darkness.

Now, he’s trapped with no way home, a ragtag army of women, and a sword whose only power is to modify the abilities of those around him. Not exactly winning odds.

Worse, if the Darkness isn’t stopped, not only will it devour Hell, but Earth will be next on the menu.
title: The Legendary Builder: The Builder's Sword
author: J.A. Cipriano

description:
OVERVIEW:

Three alien machines descend to the asteroid base of their enemies. The ensuing battle is short and savage. The lone survivor hopes either for rescue, or for another chance to engage its enemies. It will be a long wait… Wrik Trigardt ekes out a living in the Kandalor system with his small ship, Sinner. He is caught between his failed past and a grim present in service to the local crimelord, Dusko. An expedition to the Rift Asteroids promises better days, but when the well of time is disturbed no one can say what will surface. Set in the same universe as the Robert Fenaday/Shasti Rainhell stories, but decades later, My Outcast State begins a new cycle of exploration of Confederation Space.

Note: There are two (5) book cycles in this work. Maauro Chronicles and Maaruo Seachanges.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: The Maauro Chronicles Book 1 | My Outcast State
author: Edward F McKeown

description:
OVERVIEW:

Wrik Trigardt, disgraced military pilot, and his companion, the ancient android Maauro, have survived their initial battles with the Guild, Confed government and the ancient Infestor Artifact. With the aid of the beautiful and canny Jaelle and the reluctant service of the former crimelord Dusko, they have established Lost Planet expeditions to go where others dare not. But the reach of the government is long and they are soon called on to a journey to a gas giant on the edge of Confed space among the utterly alien Ribisans. There they will face an enemy who can twist time and space. Each move could bring interstellar war. Maauro and Wrik's friendship deepens in new and unexpected ways as they must battle their inner limitations as well as this new enemy.
Against that Time continues Wrik's search for redemption and Maauro’s quest for identity in this new existence she has begun since being found after 50,000 years on an asteroid in My Outcast State.

Do Androids Dream of Alien Smugglers, Galactic Heroes, Space Pirates, and Alien War? Are they capable of Precognition and Predicting the Future? Can they learn to be human? Can an Android-Human Friendship transcend the differences between flesh and circuit? Freebooters on a Secret Interstellar Mission Team up with an incredibly powerful Android Woman to track down an Ancient Alien Artifact on a Mysterious Alien Planet. Rocket into this Science Fiction Spectacle of Sentient Races and High Adventure throughout The Milky Way Galaxy. Military Science Fiction Space Opera Romance has never been more fun!


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: The Maauro Chronicles Book 2 | Against That Time
author: Edward F McKeown

description:
OVERVIEW:

A scientific expedition has disappeared in 'trackless space,' and only the 'Lost Planet' agency has a shot at finding them and rescuing the grandson of Shasti Rainhell, secret ruler of Olympia. And so it is that star-pilot Wrik Trigardt and his female android partner Maauro, set off for uncharted stars while enemies known and unknown bar their path.

Wrik and the ancient artificial intelligence 'Maauro' have formed the Lost Planet Agency are commissioned by Shasti Rainhell, greatest creation of the genetic engineers of Olympia, to find her grandson, missing with an expedition seeking the fabled Lost Colony of the first humans to leave the Sol System. But the Confederacy is wracked by enemies within and without and many would just as soon see the lost remain so. Wrik's spaceship, Stardust, lifts for uncharted stars and unknown perils.

Do Androids Dream of Giant Robots, Alien Smugglers, Galactic Heroes, and Alien War? Are they capable of Defeating Giant Robots? Can they learn to be human? Can an Android-Human Friendship transcend the differences between flesh and circuit? Freebooters from The Lost Planet Agency on a Secret Interstellar Mission travel to uncharted stars and unknown perils and Team up with an incredibly powerful Android Woman to find the lost grandson of one of the galaxy’s greatest heroes on a Mysterious Alien Planet known as the Fabled Lost Colony of First Humans. Rocket into this Science Fiction Spectacle of Sentient Races and High Adventure throughout The Milky Way Galaxy. Military Science Fiction Space Opera Artificial Intelligence Romance has never been more fun!

The third book in Edward McKeown's The Maauro Chronicles, and set in the same universe as the Robert Fenaday/Shasti Rainhell stories, THE LOST continues Maauro and Wrik’s ongoing adventures as they discover secrets others dare not seek.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: The Maauro Chronicles Book 3 | The Lost
author: Edward F McKeown

description:
OVERVIEW:

Maauro and Wrik’s adventures continue, but will they do so together? Maauro having acquired the wealth and special materials she needs to reconstruct her severed arm, awakens from her repair to find Wrik Trigardt gone. Compelled by his dark past, Wrik has set off on a journey to redeem himself to the people he left behind. Lost Planet is being torn apart as the split between Wrik and Jaelle Tekala has become irrevocable.

How could this day get worse? Enter Candace Deveraux of Confed Intelligence, with word that a sextet of stolen combat androids and a ruthless cyber-hacking genius have broken free of Confederate control and are bound for the same world as Wrik.

All the Difference opens a new chapter for Maauro in her ongoing voyage into emotional sentience. For Wrik, it is a confrontation with his past, that will determine who he will be from now on.

The fourth book in Edward McKeown’s The Maauro Chronicles, and set in the same universe as the Robert Fenaday/Shasti Rainhell stories, All The Difference continues Maauro and Wrik’s ongoing adventures as they discover secrets others dare not seek.

Do Androids Dream of Psychotic Human Cyborgs, Alien Smugglers, Galactic Heroes, and Civil War? Are they capable of Defeating Rogue War Machines? Can they love a human being? Can an Android-Human Friendship transcend the differences between flesh and circuit? A forbidden boundary just might be crossed. The owner of The Lost Planet Agency, who is also the Captain and Head Pilot of The Stardust, takes a break from his usual dangerous missions to return home to face charges of military desertion and cowardice. Rocket into this Science Fiction Spectacle of Sentient Races and High Adventure throughout The Milky Way Galaxy. Military Science Fiction Space Opera Artificial Intelligence Romance has never been more fun!


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: The Maauro Chronicles Book 4 | All The Difference
author: Edward F McKeown

description:
OVERVIEW:

Maauro and Wrik face their greatest challenge. A new area of space is being devastated by an unknown force: colonies and ships are disappearing. They accept Shasti Rainhell’s commission to find out what has happened and search for a lost cruiser. The voyage reunites them with the deadly Olivia Croyzer of Confed Intelligence. No one can imagine what awaits them on the other end of the starjump.

Do Androids Dream of Ancient Space Monsters, Alien Smugglers, Galactic Heroes, and Civil War? Are they capable of finding lost spaceships? Can they love a human being? Can an Android-Human Friendship transcend the differences between flesh and circuit? The Lost Planet Agency travels into dangerous and unknown space sectors on an unbelievable rescue mission. Rocket into this Science Fiction Spectacle of Sentient Races and High Adventure throughout The Milky Way Galaxy. Military Science Fiction Space Opera Artificial Intelligence Romance has never been more fun!


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: The Maauro Chronicles Book 5 | When Fighting Monsters
author: Edward F McKeown

description:
OVERVIEW:

Life as the God of Time is only getting better and better.

My territories are thriving, my own castle is near completion, and several of my women are pregnant with my children.

But we’ll need a talented midwife before my wives go into labor. And who better than the mother Mahini has been missing?

So, it’s off to the Kotar Desert to find my mother-in-law, but I quickly learn the desert has its own share of problems which need a god to solve…

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
seriesName: The OP MC: God of Winning
title: The OP MC 10: The God of Winning
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The God of Time has defeated the warlord terrorizing the Kotar Desert, but my job in the sandy kingdom isn’t done yet.

Monsters from myths and nightmares are still roaming the dunes, and I suspect someone is summoning them, so it’s up to me to find him.

In between being a new father and dragon tamer, of course.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
seriesName: The OP MC: God of Winning
title: The OP MC 11: The God of Winning
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

I have brought peace to the Kotar Desert, but my work is never done.

Now that I’m returning to Sorreyal, I will have to check in on my holdings as Archduke, make sure things are still thriving in Bastianville, and spend time with my women and child.

But I know there are still other gods out there, and then word arrives from the king that things are not well in the capital.

So it’s off on another adventure for the God of Time.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
seriesName: The OP MC: God of Winning
title: The OP MC 12: The God of Winning
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

There’s never a dull moment for the God of Time.

My second child is due to be born any day now, and the King of Sorreyal doesn’t seem up to the task of leading the kingdom anymore.

There’s also the God of the Plague and the Goddess of Death to worry about.

But it’s nothing I can’t handle. Especially after I upgrade my fast travel ability.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
seriesName: The OP MC: God of Winning
title: The OP MC 13: The God of Winning
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The Goddess of Death has joined my harem, and two of my other wives are running the kingdom of Sorreyal in my stead.

Things are definitely looking up for the God of Time and his family, but my kingdom and loved ones won’t know true peace until the God of Plague is dead.

So it’s time to take the war to him.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
seriesName: The OP MC: God of Winning
title: The OP MC 14: The God of Winning
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

I used to be just another guy with an office job.

Now, I am the God of Time, the God of Winning, the Great One of Legend. With my power of infinite lives, I am unstoppable. I win every battle, kill every enemy, and get the best women.

It’s only a matter of time before this whole realm bows to me, but for now, I have my eyes set on the Duke of Bullard.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
seriesName: The OP MC: God of Winning
title: The OP MC 2: The God of Winning
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

It’s awesome being the God of Time.

I can never lose, never die, and being the Great One of Legend doesn’t hurt with the women of this world either.

And sometimes things get even better.

Like when a dragon shows up, and I am tasked with the quest of defeating it.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
seriesName: The OP MC: God of Winning
title: The OP MC 3: The God of Winning
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

Life as the God of Time is just awesome.

Not only am I a deity in this fantastical world, but now I’m also a Knight of Sorreyal, a Dragon Slayer, and the Archduke of my own duchy. But not everyone is a fan of my success, and someone is trying to kill me from the shadows.

My enemies will soon learn I’m also the God of Winning.

And I never, ever lose.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
seriesName: The OP MC: God of Winning
title: The OP MC 4: The God of Winning
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The God of Winning has won yet again.
I’ve successfully dealt with two of my enemies in one blow with no one the wiser that I was involved, and I also got filthy rich in the process.
But the kingdom of Sorreyal has more enemies, from within and without, and there’s no better time and place to root them out than at a nobility summit in the capital.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
seriesName: The OP MC: God of Winning
title: The OP MC 5: The God of Winning
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

I have once again saved the kingdom of Sorreyal from a nefarious plot, but the job’s not over yet.
The Duke of Edinburg thinks that he can escape justice, but he’ll soon learn he can’t outwit the God of Time.
So, it’s time to have a Duke Hunt, and I’ll find the cowardly weasel, even if I have to get through all his sons first.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
seriesName: The OP MC: God of Winning
title: The OP MC 6: The God of Winning
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

The Duke of Edinburg has been taken care of, I’ve married another one of my gorgeous women, and Bastianville is growing by the day.
Life is good for the God of Time.
But it could be better.
I could be more powerful.
Which is why I’m searching every corner of this medieval fantasy realm for every magical secret I can find.
Even if they're all the way across the ocean.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
seriesName: The OP MC: God of Winning
title: The OP MC 7: The God of Winning
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

I’ve defeated the God of the Purge, but the oceans and their island inhabitants are far from safe.
Pirates terrorize the seas, and people live in fear of slavery and death.
But what none of them know yet is that Red Hands the Pirate Bane has arrived, and I won’t stop until every pirate is dead.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
seriesName: The OP MC: God of Winning
title: The OP MC 8: The God of Winning
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

With the fast travel amulets now in my possession, I am the God of Time and Space.

I can travel to the far reaches of the world and then blip back to Bastianville, and my wives, with just a thought.

The world is my oyster.

And for my next quest, I think it’s time for the God of Time to have his own dragonscale armor.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
seriesName: The OP MC: God of Winning
title: The OP MC 9: The God of Winning
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
OVERVIEW:

I was a nobody gamer working a dead-end tech support job.
But then I was pulled into this strange fantasy world, and I’ve learned that I possess a power that makes me, quite literally, a god walking among mere mortals.
Now I always win every fight.
Now I always get the best girls in my harem.
Now I have infinite and unlimited potential to get better.
And now I’m gonna have fun trying every possibility.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
seriesName: The OP MC: God of Winning
title: The OP MC: God of Winning
author: Logan Jacobs

description:
What if anything you wrote came true?

When an angry midget at a traveling carnival promises Roger something that could change his life,
he never thought it would come in the form of a magic pen.

Now, anything the introverted college student writes becomes true, and with its power, he’ll finally be
able to take revenge on the bullies who have tormented him over the years.

There’s just one problem. A group of assassins will do anything to get the pen, he accidentally made
an entire squad of dancers into slaves, and his best friend somehow got an all-powerful mech.

Maybe that’s three problems, but either way, Roger might just find out that the pen is mightier.

PLEASE NOTE: THIS IS A GRAPHIC STORY FEATURING HOT SEX, A DUDE WHO HAS A MAGIC PEN, AWESOME WEAPONS, VIOLENCE, NON-VIOLENCE, MORE SEX, A HAREM, CHEERLEADERS, STRIPPERS, NINJAS, ASSASSINS, MURDER, MORE SEX, GAMBLING, HELICOPTER EXPLOSIONS, A BITCHY BOSS, MECHS, A BULLY WHO GETS WHAT IS COMING TO HIM, AND AN MC WHO STRUGGLES WITH TRYING TO BE A GOOD PERSON WHILE HAVING ULTIMATE POWER. DO THE MATH, PLEASE.
title: The Pen is Mightier
author: J.A. Cipriano

description:
It should have been the high life for Roger. Magic pen that makes nearly anything he writes come true, a small army of hot, capable women, and his best friend by his side in Las Vegas. What more could a guy ask for?

Unfortunately, Roger has a problem. A pen user with a power unlike anything he’s seen before has set his sights on Las Vegas. The thing is, Roger kind of likes Las Vegas how it is, after all, most of his stuff is there. And what’s more, no one threatens his women or his city. Now, he’ll do anything to protect his people and his city, even if it means taking a trip to Monaco to infiltrate a high stakes poker game, hobnobbing with eccentric billionaires, and befriending the former Miss Tennessee. Though not necessarily in that order.

Hey, it might not be easy, but someone’s got to do it, right?

PLEASE NOTE: THIS IS A GRAPHIC STORY FEATURING HOT SEX, A DUDE WHO HAS A MAGIC PEN, AWESOME WEAPONS, VIOLENCE, NON-VIOLENCE, MORE SEX, A HAREM, CHEERLEADERS, STRIPPERS, NINJAS, ASSASSINS, MURDER, MORE SEX, HIGH-STAKES POKER, FASHION MODELS, MECHANICAL POWER SUITS, AND AN MC WHO STRUGGLES WITH TRYING TO BE A GOOD PERSON WHILE HAVING ULTIMATE POWER. DO THE MATH, PLEASE.
title: The Pen is Mightier 2: Company Ink
author: J.A. Cipriano

description:
Roger had everything. With his magic pen that makes anything he writes to become reality, fantastic wealth, and a tight-knit group of gorgeous, incredible women, there wasn’t much more he could ask for … until he decides to turn that amazing pen towards helping the people of Las Vegas with a charity hospital.

Unfortunately, Roger quickly finds out that there may be one thing stronger than his pen: red tape. Threatened by Roger’s efforts, a greedy billionaire with fingers in every pie and half the government in his pocket will do anything to keep the fat cats on top and the downtrodden, well, trodden down. From assassins, mud-slinging, and even the dreaded health inspector, no tactic is too slimy.

With the gauntlet thrown, Roger will pull out all the stops to bring the power back to the people, even if he has to take down the entire U.S. government to do it!
title: The Pen is Mightier 3: To Vegas With Love
author: J.A. Cipriano

description:
When Roger got rid of the world’s most corrupt individuals that was just the beginning. Turns out that it’s a lot harder to put the world back together again than it is to break it.

…or at least it would be if you didn’t have a magical pen that made your every last whim come true.
title: The Pen is Mightier 4: Fresh Ink
author: J.A. Cipriano

description:
OVERVIEW:

Wyatt took a dead-end job in his hometown for two reasons: hiking, and being close to his family. When trekking over the trails he loves, he comes face to face with a cougar he cannot avoid.

As the pre-eminent hunter for the Shifter Nations of North America, Gabrielle isn't surprised when the Shifter Council calls her. A rogue cougar has been killing hikers. The job: put the beast down, and do it fast. She has never failed a hunt.

The trail leads her to the site of a fierce, bloody battle. She finds a wounded hiker, a dead cougar, and one inescapable conclusion.

There's a new cat in town.
title: The Primogenitor Saga 1: Smilodon
author: Robert M. Kerns

description:
OVERVIEW:

Sloane happily worked as a farmhand for an elderly couple in Nebraska...until people arrived in blacked-out SUVs asking about a woman who turns into a giant bird. When Sloane refused to go with them, they killed her elderly employers and razed the farm to the ground. Then? They pinned the crimes on her. Sloane's been running ever since.

Karleen returns to Precious after a meeting with her sister. She's within an hour of home when a woman stumbles out of the underbrush lining the road and collapses on the yellow line. The woman whispers one word as she passes out: hunters.

There's only one thing for Karleen to do...
title: The Primogenitor Saga 2: Roc
author: Robert M. Kerns

description:
OVERVIEW:

New Job. New Faces. New Challenges.

Wyatt has settled into his role as Alpha of Godwin County and the town of Precious. Lyssa has moved to Precious full-time, only traveling to Chicago for Shifter Council meetings. Life is good.
 
But Wyatt's peace shatters when Miles arrives and says, "Lad, we need to talk."
 
Join Wyatt as he uncovers a truth that will change the shifters' world forever.
title: The Primogenitor Saga 3: Consular Times
author: Robert M. Kerns

description:
OVERVIEW:

A final sacrifice. War averted. The world changed forever.

The impending Second Faerie War looms large in Vicki’s and Wyatt’s worries. The shifters are on-side and awaiting the clarion call to act.

The Magi? Not so much…

Then, Miles takes matters into his own hands, and the world will never be the same.
title: The Primogenitor Saga 4: Tempus
author: Robert M. Kerns

description:
“Shards of Fate” is the compelling, five part story about the immortal, Kamae Caineson. A man whose recent, three century long slumber, has recently come to an end one cold and rainy night in a Los Angeles museum. Kamae struggles with adjusting to life in the modern world with only his children and their friends to aid him. He must once again thrust himself into the very fight he tried to escape at the beginning of the 18th century, in order to rescue his beloved from the grasp his ancient enemy has mystically placed her in.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: The Rising: Shards of Fate Book 1
author: Charles Anthony

description:
OVERVIEW:

One day, I’m just trying to make ends meet as a security guard at the Smithsonian Museum in Washington, DC.
Then I happened upon a mysterious pocket watch and ended up in the year 1814.
Time traveling takes a little getting used to, but it definitely helped that I found a pretty blonde woman to help me navigate 19th century DC.
And when I discovered I could take things from the past and bring them to the future, a very lucrative idea took root in my brain…

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Time Pirate
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

My life was turned upside down when I found a time traveling watch during my security job at the Smithsonian Museum. One minute, I was standing in modern DC, and the next, I was in 1814.
And things have only gotten crazier since then.
I fell in love with a 19th century woman and brought her back to the present day, and through her, I also obtained a very expensive looking tie pin and a first edition, signed copy of Pride and Prejudice.
Now, I just have to figure out how to sell these things without making the IRS suspicious.
And then I need to decide what I’m going to steal from the past next.

description:
Life as a time traveling pirate comes with its ups and downs.

On the plus side, in selling my loot, I’ve made more money in the past few weeks than I’ve made in my entire life.

The downside? It seems my new Russian boss might be looking for the time traveling pocket watch.

I need to lay low for a little bit, and what better way than going to Richmond to help my girlfriend solve her own personal family mystery? One of her uncles disappeared in the fifties, and I am uniquely suited to find out what happened to him.

But if he thinks I’m going to take this sitting down, he has another thing coming.

On the plus side, I’ve made a lot of money looting my way through history, and I even found one of my girlfriends in the 19th century and brought her home with me.

However, this watch has also put a target on my back and dragged me into an international war involving Russian crime syndicates.

And just when I think I’ve gotten them off my back, they pop up again, like a bad penny.

Unfortunately, because of my time traveling pocket watch, I’ve become the most wanted man in all of Russia.

But that’s not going to stop me from living my life in Washington D.C.

In between dodging assassination attempts and trying to hunt down the man who is both trying to kill me and is now in possession of a mind control device, my women and I have set our sights on the Civil War.

A lot of people will apparently pay a pretty penny for war memorabilia, and if this watch is going to bring so much trouble into my life, I might as well use it to make me rich, too.

My online shop of questionably acquired antiques has gained some attention, and Cloud Jones, the nepo baby heiress I’d stolen from but also saved, has a job for me.

A priceless necklace was stolen from her family in the 1920’s, and she’s offering me a lot of money to find it for her.

Taking a trip to the Roaring Twenties definitely sounds a lot more fun than slogging through the mud of a Civil War battlefield.

And, when I do end up taking the job, I manage to meet a pretty pilot full of moxie who shows me around twentieth century Los Angeles.

I don’t know what this guy’s motivations are, but a second watch is definitely not good for the timeline.

I have so many questions, and it looks like the only way to get answers is to go back to Imperial Russia, where all of this craziness first began.

description:
OVERVIEW:

Even a Hero Needs a Vacation Every Now and Then

Can this legendary hero keep his humble tavern safe from criminals, corrupt officials, and those who might expose his secret?

Archibold Stormblood, Visseria’s greatest hero, is finally taking a break. After two centuries spent battling dark lords and saving the world, he figures he’s earned a little peace—or so he hopes. Leaving his legendary past behind, Archibold now lives as an unassuming mortal nineteen-year-old, running the Tipsy Pelican Tavern, where he brews tasty spell-chilled ales and enjoys stories and laughs with his quirky patrons.

Trouble is the last thing he needs in his life—especially any trouble in the form of the White Church, corrupt officials, crime syndicates, or whatever his strong-willed barmaids manage to stir up.

With his immortal powers sealed and his true identity a closely guarded secret, can Archibold hold onto his hard-won peace, or will he be forced to don the mantle of hero once more?

Join the thousands of readers who are raving about the Tipsy Pelican Tavern series, an unputdownable fantasy adventure spiced with unique magic, tense action, laugh-out-loud humor, and a foaming mug of wit and heart.

author: August

description:
OVERVIEW:

I’ve always liked superheroes, but I didn’t like how they rarely took care of the bad guys… permanently.

Then I became a vampire, and I found out there was a whole other world that needed blood. Lots and lots of blood.

And they’d pay good money for it.

Now, I’m out to capture these criminal scumbags, turn them into a meal, and get rich doing it.

But living among elite vampires is a lot more dangerous than I anticipated, so I’m going to have to be careful if I want to get rich and build a massive empire.

OVERVIEW:

Settling into my new life as a rich vampire sire is going better than I expected. My mansion is feeling more like home every night, every room seems to be hiding more hoards of platinum coins, and my two pale-skinned lovers are worshiping me nonstop.

There’s also a third woman in the house now who’s seeking my attention and guidance.

But juggling all of this with the opening of my illegal blood bar is going to be tricky.

I’ve got criminals to drain, platinum to exchange, and a whole vampire government to avoid.

Not to mention, the mafia of other vampire sires.

author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

Ragnarok is coming.

To save this world, I mastered the secret rune magic, crafted the most powerful weapons and armor ever devised, and enslaved every living soul to me.

Now, all men serve me, and all women desire to bear my powerful offspring. I am the All-Father, the Rune Smith. The God King. The only one standing between the end times and life everlasting.

But once, my name was Aaron, and I came from a world named Earth and an Alaskan village named Talkeetna.

This is my saga.

author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

Enslave the World

The time has come to venture into the wilds of the northern mountains and the arctic coast.

Far beyond the borders of Svelgard, the truth about the origins of my mark and my wife’s mysterious wings can be found deep inside the den of the wolves, in the bowels of the old world.

I will fight as many savage Farthegns, vicious beasts, and brutal elements as I have to in order to get the answers I’m after.

And what I find on this journey will change everything, even my fate.
title: Viking Rune Smith 2
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

Enslave the World

TIt’s time to bring Hylmrek to their knees.

These ruthless Farthegns have been breathing down my neck for too long, but the might of their legendary army isn’t something to take lightly. I’ll need all the warriors I can get on my side to finally put Hylmrek under my boot.

So it looks to me like there’s only one option: bringing the combined strength of Illska and Dalir down on some Farthegn sea dogs.

Then unleashing the wrath of Clan Briggs on our most dangerous enemies.

With a hell of a lot of runed weapons.

And a few of my Valkyrie wives.
title: Viking Rune Smith 3
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

Enslave the World

Only three Farthegn clans remain unconquered, and then the entire Red Forest will fall to Clan Briggs.

Tracking down the strongholds of the two most elusive clans is proving to be a difficult task, though. The furthest reaches of the forest harbor strange dark magics, ungodly predators, and more advanced weapons than I’ve come across yet.

So it sure as hell would be nice if there wasn’t also a flock of wayward reapers on our trail.

But nothing will stop me from unleashing the full might of my massive army on my enemies.

And sending my gorgeous Valkyrie wives to lead my legion of fallen warriors to Valhalla.
title: Viking Rune Smith 4
author: Michael-Scott Earle

description:
OVERVIEW:

No one knows why it started, but the monster invasion all began right here, in Heathen Row.
Ever since, men all over the world have been on the menu. And women have been at the frontlines, hunting the predators.
But in a world where women are over-armed, over-paid, and under-satiated, Chris Hart isn’t staying safe inside while the monsters come out to feast.
He’s living a double life, and doing his damndest to make sure no scientists, corporations, or hired monster hunters find out about the powers he gained the night he came to Heathen Row.
Or about the sexy monster woman he’s hiding away to complete his own private mission.

So lock your doors and load your guns. It’s going to be a bloody night.

It’s a challenge to overcome.

Now that he’s got two outrageously murderous and sexy monster women by his side, Chris is ready to take on any and all obstacles that threaten his mission.

And hey, sometimes that requires outsmarting uppity hunters, running corporate scientists out of town, slaughtering the creepiest damn beasts you could imagine, and still finding time to satiate the lethal appetites of your monster women.

Luckily, it’s always a good day for killin’ in the famous Heathen Row.

Whoever is responsible for these grotesque displays is having a bit too much fun with it, and they’re keeping themselves well-hidden, too.

It looks like it’s time for Chris to bring his vicious monster women out on the hunt, but this is easier said than done when every hunter in the country wants to get in on the action.

Hark!

Hank Baker, Questing Knight, hath made his mark upon fair Lupercalia! He hath felled mighty foes and recovered plentiful treasures, but a Questing Knight’s duties are endless: destroying more of the Moon Goddess’ enemies and cleansing the taint from Her holy places. description:
OVERVIEW:

description:
OVERVIEW:

Thousands of demons are joining forces, but there’s no stopping this righteous storm.

Not now that the Dragon God of Dracoria has gained the ultimate reign over all worlds.

My army will come marching from any land at my order. And even if I have to travel all the way to Earth for the perfect weapons, we will end this tyranny of evil once and for all.

But with so many angels left to save, and so many dragon forms to gain, my life as a god is getting very, very interesting.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Wrath of the Dragon 6
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

The magical shard that’s been haunting Gladewood is still in the wind, as is the wizard I believe is behind all the attacks the town has suffered.

Still, there have been some perks to magic returning to Mystica.

Many of the elves in town, my girlfriend Ellyn included, have retrained their newly awakened powers, and they aren’t the only ones.

Something weird’s been happening to me… but if I can use these new abilities to help my farm, and the land around Gladewood, I’m not going to look a gift horse in the mouth.

Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Fantasy World Farm 6
author: Eric Vall

description:
OVERVIEW:

The time has come to wage our war on the Lord of Chaos.

All of my allies have been rounded up, and our army will march on the Deeper Dark to free the mortals trapped there and end the Demon Lords’ reign.

If we succeed, then all the peoples of the underground caverns will finally be free.

But if we fail, Belzat will break his banishment, and The Gloom, Twilight Region, and even the surface will fall into darkness.

So, we better not fail.


Looking for the ebook?  Find it on Amazon
title: Backyard Dungeon 22
author: Logan Jacobs
